faqs.question: What specializations do Mahatma Gandhi Vidyamandir's Pharmacy College offer in their courses?
faqs.answer: Mahatma Gandhi Vidyamandir's Pharmacy College offers courses such as Pharm.D, B.Pharma, D.Pharma, M.Pharma. The courses are available in full-time mode. Mahatma Gandhi Vidyamandir's Pharmacy College has specializations such as Pharmaceutical, Pharmacognosy, Pharmacology, Quality Assurance .

placements.overview: UG Degree (4 year) : In year 2017-18, for 4 year UG Degree, a total of 60 students were admitted at Mahatma Gandhi Vidyamandir's Pharmacy College and 69 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 69 students 15 were placed with median salary of INR 150000 and 37 students opted for higher studies. A total of 59 students were admitted in year 2018-19 for 4 year UG degree at Mahatma Gandhi Vidyamandir's Pharmacy Collegeand 64 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 64 students 14 were placed with median salary of INR 200000 and 34 students opted for higher studies. PG Degree (2 year) : In year 2019-20, for 2 year PG Degree, a total of 53 students were admitted at Mahatma Gandhi Vidyamandir's Pharmacy College and 53 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 53 students 35 were placed with median salary of INR 250000. A total of 53 students were admitted in year 2020-21 for 2 year PG degree at Mahatma Gandhi Vidyamandir's Pharmacy Collegeand 53 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 53 students 34 were placed with median salary of INR 280000.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Mahatma Gandhi Vidyamandir's Pharmacy College provides Full Time programs at the UG and PG levels. These courses are available in stream like Medicine & Health Sciences, and have a fee structure of around INR 12,000 to 4,74,784. UG programs include B.Pharma and D.Pharma. Further, the PG programs include M.Pharma.

faqs.answer: A:    Combined intake across all courses at Mahatma Gandhi Vidyamandir's Pharmacy College is up to 246. Mahatma Gandhi Vidyamandir's Pharmacy College offers Pharm.D, B.Pharma, D.Pharma, M.Pharma courses for students to build their careers in Medicine & Health Sciences. These highly regarded programs are available in full-time mode, catering to the needs of students who wish to obtain a comprehensive education in this field.

reviews_list.batch_info: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: MGV'S Pharmacy College, Panchavati, Nashik.

review_content.Placements: There is no experience of Pharma.D placements because no batch is yet passed out from college. The other department placements are well good. Every year the placements of MPHARM and Ph.D. is well good in reputed companies. The companies include pharmaceutical companies and industries.
review_content.Infrastructure: The pharmacy college consists of two buildings. One with the Diploma and other with B.Pharma, MPHARM and PharmD. The parking facilities should be improved. The laboratories of the college is good with respective subject. The college hostel is also good but the infrastructure should be maintained properly. I don't have idea for the hostel as I am a localised person from Nashik.

reviews_list.batch_info: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Mahatma Gandhi Vidyamandir, Nashik.

review_content.Placements: There are a lot of opportunities provided by college. Placement should be given to clinical pharmacists and assistant professors in pharmacy. Packages start from a minimum of 3 lakhs annually to a maximum of 12 lakhs. Our role in our course is as clinical pharmacists.
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs, classrooms, and libraries are well furnished with good infrastructure. All facilities and apparatus should be provided by the department. The library staff is too good; they give all books with discipline. The laboratory in charge also provides good facilities during practical sessions.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Placements are not provided in our college.

review_content.Placements: Placements are not provided in our college. Students can directly contact industries after completing the course. Companies don't visit our college for recruitment.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi facilities are available for all the students and staff members. All the classrooms are fully digitalised and have projectors. Library has around 5 lakh books and study materials. There is no sports department or canteen.
review_content.Faculty: Teaching quality is the best. Faculty members in our college are highly qualified with Ph.D. Exams are conducted very strictly which improves the score of students for university examinations. The pass percentage is 70%.

reviews_list.batch_info: Sanitary Inspector's Diploma Course - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: My experience in the AIILSG was satisfactory.

review_content.Placements: The placements in the institute is mostly depending on the student but there is one thing that there are many vacancies that are available for this course so it is well good to have this course done. Top roles offered in this course are senior sanitary inspector and assistant sanitary inspector.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the college is quite interesting as there is spacious classrooms, clean laboratories and there is also a garden in front of the college building, so the overall environment of the college is enhanced. There is no hostel facility available here.

reviews_list.batch_info: Sanitary Inspector's Diploma Course - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: The college is to gain knowledge and to do the course of sanitary inspector.

review_content.Placements: There are 40 students in a batch, and around half of them are eligible to get placed. As it is preferable for government jobs, companies do not visit here. There is training outside the college, and they show what is the role of sanitary inspector. They also have a course in hotel management.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure available are not very good, but the study here is good. They will not provide Wi-Fi and a library. Canteen is good, but there are no sports. Medical facilities are provided. We also go on tours, and we go to the lab twice in a month.

faqs.answer: Humanities as a stream provides a wide range of courses that can be studied after completing their 12th grade. Pursuing any of these degrees prepares you to understand the various levels of humanities and, as a result, carve out an appropriate job path. review_summary.college_name: All India Institute of Local Self Government Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Science in Laboratory Techniques (B.Sc.LT) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: The college is really good with a nice infrastructure. It is recommended.

content.Placements: 50% of students get placed here. The package offered is 5 LPA. The top recruiting companies for our course are Fortis Hospital and KEM Hospital. Roles like senior lab technician, medical laboratory technologist/technician, clinical laboratory scientist, lab supervisor/manager, and specialised roles like blood bank technician, histotechnologist, and molecular biologist are offered to students.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, pathology, library, and good canteen food are provided. It has clean washrooms. Labs are equipped with materials. There are very helpful lab technicians. There is a big ground for sports like cricket and football. It has updated classrooms.

individual_reviews.course: Sanitary Inspector's Diploma Course - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: AIILSG has best course (S.I.).

content.Placements: They have not show percentage of students. It's up to you how will you give job exam. They only have one package 30,000. They not have any recruitment company. Not need of percentage for internship they offer internship the role was health workers and paramedical.
content.Infrastructure: The course of sanitary inspector they have, they were explaining everything in terms of 3D ways, eg model. All classroom has A.C. and smartbrod. They have canteen and the food of canteen was good they also has very good medical facilities because the all teachers was doctor.

individual_reviews.course: Sanitary Inspector's Diploma Course - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: My experience in the AIILSG was satisfactory.

content.Placements: The placements in the institute is mostly depending on the student but there is one thing that there are many vacancies that are available for this course so it is well good to have this course done. Top roles offered in this course are senior sanitary inspector and assistant sanitary inspector.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the college is quite interesting as there is spacious classrooms, clean laboratories and there is also a garden in front of the college building, so the overall environment of the college is enhanced. There is no hostel facility available here.

individual_reviews.course: Sanitary Inspector's Diploma Course - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: The college is to gain knowledge and to do the course of sanitary inspector.

content.Placements: There are 40 students in a batch, and around half of them are eligible to get placed. As it is preferable for government jobs, companies do not visit here. There is training outside the college, and they show what is the role of sanitary inspector. They also have a course in hotel management.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure available are not very good, but the study here is good. They will not provide Wi-Fi and a library. Canteen is good, but there are no sports. Medical facilities are provided. We also go on tours, and we go to the lab twice in a month.

individual_reviews.course: Sanitary Inspector's Diploma Course - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Overall, satisfied with the college.

content.Placements: Recruitment is done two months after the completion of our course. The students who get an aggregate of above 75% get a chance to be a sanitary inspector. Students have to be loyal in their work and have to work sincerely for 2-3 years to become SI and get a promotion.
content.Infrastructure: All the classrooms are well-ventilated with air-conditioning facility. There is a separate library in the college for activities like reading and journal writing. Separate medical rooms are available in the college near the library. Field visits are arranged by the college. First aid boxes are also available for the students.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: It is one of the best medical colleges in Karnataka, MIMS, Mandya.

review_content.Placements: MIMS is a government institution for medical students. It has 4 years of education and one year of internship in the same government hospital with a monthly salary. After that, students usually take another NEET PG exam to choose their post-graduation courses.
review_content.Infrastructure: The main college campus is one single building with 6 floors, including the basement, with a terrace above the 4th floor. It has the first herbal and terrace garden in Karnataka. All the classrooms are well-equipped with projectors and mics. The hostel is average, each room accommodates 3 people with a separate cot and table, a wardrobe, and an attached bathroom. Mess food is good, the menu doesn't change much. Extracurricular activities are well supported.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Everything about Mandya Medical College.

review_content.Placements: I'm studying MBBS in a medical college in Mandya. You have to do an internship after the four years of the course, during which you will be paid 30,000 as a stipend. After that, you will receive your degree or license as a legal medical practitioner, allowing you to join any hospital as a doctor or open your own clinic and earn a minimum of 70,000 based on your capacity and knowledge of the subject.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college follows a modern education method where teachers prepare their own PPTs, display them, and explain with the help of the slides. Since the class size is around 150, you might not be able to pay proper attention. The hostel facilities are kind of okay, but not that good.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: My extraordinary college MIMS.

content.Placements: The placement after the course of MBBS is very good because any MBBS graduate gets a well paid job after it. Also, MBBS graduates can apply for NEET PG exam where they can get admission to post graduation for any subject of MBBS. So the post MBBS students from my college gets a well paid job easily.
content.Infrastructure: As my college is a government-run college, infrastructure of college is well-maintained. Our college has a central library which has all the features including the digital library. Our campus also has facilities of hostel for both boys and girls which is well-maintained.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The real fate of the government medical college in Karnataka.

content.Placements: There are 150 members per batch. All students should do rural service for one year in Karnataka state. We will get a minimum salary of Rs. 50,000 per month. As we pass the final year, we will be posted to internships with a stipend of Rs. 30,000 per month, and in rural service, it is Rs. 50,000 per month.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has a hostel, but it is not good. Our college has moderate classrooms, and not high-level classrooms. Our college has a good central library where we can go and study. Free Wi-Fi is available in the library.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is one of the best medical colleges in Karnataka, MIMS, Mandya.

content.Placements: MIMS is a government institution for medical students. It has 4 years of education and one year of internship in the same government hospital with a monthly salary. After that, students usually take another NEET PG exam to choose their post-graduation courses.
content.Infrastructure: The main college campus is one single building with 6 floors, including the basement, with a terrace above the 4th floor. It has the first herbal and terrace garden in Karnataka. All the classrooms are well-equipped with projectors and mics. The hostel is average, each room accommodates 3 people with a separate cot and table, a wardrobe, and an attached bathroom. Mess food is good, the menu doesn't change much. Extracurricular activities are well supported.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Everything about Mandya Medical College.

content.Placements: I'm studying MBBS in a medical college in Mandya. You have to do an internship after the four years of the course, during which you will be paid 30,000 as a stipend. After that, you will receive your degree or license as a legal medical practitioner, allowing you to join any hospital as a doctor or open your own clinic and earn a minimum of 70,000 based on your capacity and knowledge of the subject.
content.Infrastructure: Our college follows a modern education method where teachers prepare their own PPTs, display them, and explain with the help of the slides. Since the class size is around 150, you might not be able to pay proper attention. The hostel facilities are kind of okay, but not that good.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: A quick review of the state medical college

content.Placements: I'm now studying in the first year of MBBS, and about 150 students are allotted seats every year here. At the end of the MBBS course, we need to complete a one-month internship, which provides a salary of about 30,000. We must clear the university examinations to be eligible for the internship.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good but old, including the hostel. We are given three-sharing rooms with all necessary facilities, including a table, chair, and cupboard. The library, classrooms, and laboratories are well-maintained. There is also a ground on the college campus.

Mandya Institute of Medical Sciences, Mandya MBBS cutoff 2025 was 26836 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. For the General AI category, closing ranks varied from 2281 to 129720, with MD in General Medicine being the most challenging for admission. Mandya Institute of Medical Sciences, Mandya accepts the NEET PG results for admission to PG-level medical courses, like MD and MS courses. reviews.review_heading: My extraordinary college MIMS.
reviews.review_text: As my college is a government-run college, infrastructure of college is well-maintained. Our college has a central library which has all the features including the digital library. Our campus also has facilities of hostel for both boys and girls which is well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: The real fate of the government medical college in Karnataka.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a hostel, but it is not good. Our college has moderate classrooms, and not high-level classrooms. Our college has a good central library where we can go and study. Free Wi-Fi is available in the library.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best medical colleges in Karnataka, MIMS, Mandya.
reviews.review_text: The main college campus is one single building with 6 floors, including the basement, with a terrace above the 4th floor. It has the first herbal and terrace garden in Karnataka. All the classrooms are well-equipped with projectors and mics. The hostel is average, each room accommodates 3 people with a separate cot and table, a wardrobe, and an attached bathroom. Mess food is good, the menu doesn't change much. Extracurricular activities are well supported.

reviews.review_heading: Everything about Mandya Medical College.
reviews.review_text: Our college follows a modern education method where teachers prepare their own PPTs, display them, and explain with the help of the slides. Since the class size is around 150, you might not be able to pay proper attention. The hostel facilities are kind of okay, but not that good.

reviews.review_heading: A quick review of the state medical college
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good but old, including the hostel. We are given three-sharing rooms with all necessary facilities, including a table, chair, and cupboard. The library, classrooms, and laboratories are well-maintained. There is also a ground on the college campus.

reviews.review_heading: MIMS is very good for learning, apart from hostel and mess.
reviews.review_text: There is a separate library and reading room in college with Wi-Fi. Very spacious classrooms. Good equipment in the lab. Food quality is not at all good, and that is unhygienic. Menu will be repeated weakly once, hostel! Maintenance fee is 25300 and monthly Mess bill is around 3500-4000. Should be paid, which is unworthy compared to the PG that is nearby to us.

reviews.review_heading: College is absolutely fine, but the hostel is not at all good.
reviews.review_text: There is a library and reading room in college itself. Very huge classrooms, and there is Wi-Fi in the library and reading room. The hostel rooms are not well maintained, and the mess is very ugly. The food that they provide is not at all good and unhygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Mandya Institute of Medical Sciences, Mandya.
reviews.review_text: Our college facilities and infrastructure are pretty good, so we can continue our course peacefully for 5.5 years. Our labs are very clean and well maintained by workers. The library is situated in the college itself and opened throughout the day. And the quality of the food here is pretty nice and hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Mandya Institute of Medical Sciences, Mandya.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is minimal, and the labs are well designed with sophisticated and well-equipped instruments. Classrooms are well-equipped with modern learning facilities, and the library has highly professional magazines and books with the availability of a 24x7 Wi-Fi facility.

reviews.review_heading: This is about my college life at Mandya Institute of Medical Sciences, Mandya.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good, but the hostel infrastructure is very bad. Hot water is not available 24*7, and the mess is available but the food is not up to the mark. Hygiene maintenance is poor, and free Wi-Fi is not available so we have to pay for a connection. There are three shared B.Ed rooms available.

reviews.review_heading: Worth choosing, read more .
reviews.review_text: South Karnataka people will feel it okay for the mess food, however it will be good. Don't have high expectations by watching shots; the mess is run by students itself, but the infrastructure of the hostel is not up to its marks and name (it was built around 2006, I guess); the college is good; there is no gym; the library has a Wi-Fi connection; the classroom could get good ( it's not good at all); you will have a good time in sports here; everyone is competitive; we have good ground .

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty and satisfied with the maintenance.
reviews.review_text: Average maintenance in hostels, and in college washrooms, broken fans, mess food taste-wise good, but very unhealthy; the condition of rooms is from average to bad; some rooms do not have fans; overall, the condition inside the college is above average while in the hostel it is below average.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is a very good college.
reviews.review_text: The college has a library, Wi-Fi, and a recently started cafeteria for students and staff members. The hostel is average. Our college and hostel facilities are average.

reviews.review_heading: The best government medical college in Karnataka. It has an excellent campus.
reviews.review_text: In our college, the classrooms and library are awesome. We have a digital library. Wi-Fi is available in the library with an air-conditioning facility. Labs and classrooms are the best. The hostel is average, but it's good compared to other government medical colleges. Food is generally healthy.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied and a proud student.
reviews.review_text: The college has a huge library along with Wi-Fi. The college campus is also pretty huge and also has huge laboratories and demonstration rooms. They are also equipped with quality instruments for teaching. The library also has attached study halls, there has also been preparations to set up E-library.

highlights.summary: The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Nagpur Veterinary College offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Medicine & Health Sciences and Science. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely BVSC. On the other hand, at the PG level, the Nagpur Veterinary College offers MVSC. The fees for Nagpur Veterinary College courses is INR 1,23,750.

review_content.Placements: Veterinary doctor doesn't need to work under someone; he is like the owner of the whole company. There are plenty of private as well as gov jobs which we can apply for. Government jobs: there is a post of livestock development officer for which we need to pass MPSC. There are private jobs like we can work in Vantara and other private firms. They get salaries in 6 digits. Companies like Vantara, saguna foods etc. All students need to do an internship; it is compulsory.
review_content.Infrastructure: This college ranks in the top 5 in Maharashtra and has exemplary records. This college has the greatest infrastructure, well-organised labs, pathology, and physiology labs. The anatomy lab is quite much bigger and better than other colleges. The college hostel is the best to live in, clean, and has very best facilities. There is cleanliness in the campus as well as sports facilities. There is a ground for playing sports. I didn't think the college had any bad aspects. The faculty is of top class, and all faculty members are very much experienced.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Nagpur Veterinary College Top notch.

review_content.Placements: About 95% students get placements. The highest package is about 440000 , average package is 60000 just after graduation. Venkateshwara hatcheries private limited and Suguna food private limited and may other famous companies come for recruitment. Students get selected to become livestock development officer which is class 1post .
review_content.Infrastructure: Well-equipped laboratories and equipments for practical studies are available. Library is available with Wi-Fi for 24 hours and huge room is also there. High teach classrooms with projectors and well maintained hygiene is provided. Hostels are very affordable and good mess food is there. Healthy and tasty food is provided and sports equipments are also there.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: It is an excellent college.

review_content.Placements: Around 85% of students got internships in this course.
review_content.Infrastructure: All facilities are available. Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled. We have a common study room in this college. There is a sick room on our campus. Guest room is available. Washrooms are better. It is a very good college. There is a decent library in this college. The fee structure is reasonable. Drinking water facility is very good. The waste disposal system is good. Mess is available. Hostel is perfect. The food quality is decent. Every week, doctors visit our hostel. We also have a gym facility in this college. There is a small badminton ground. Our campus has greenery all around.

individual_reviews.title: You will never regret here after joining.

content.Placements: There are around more than 80 seats for BVSC at NVC Nagpur. All are filled on the basis of NEET marks only. No private colleges and only 6 government colleges in Maharashtra for BVSC hence competition is very low in this field. After completing a degree you can for government jobs including class A officer jobs like L.D.O, V.O, Army (R.V.C), in railway sector, banks, business (poultry/dairy), research, etc. There is a separate placement cell in Mafsu. On average Rs 40,000 per month is minimum and for the highest sky is the limit.
content.Infrastructure: There are good working labs, library too with sufficient books, canteen has hygienic, tasty food. College supports every good extra talent you inert particularly for sports. Cricket, basketball, and badminton are the main games here. Some department labs are somewhat old, there is some more scope for improvement.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Jharkhand Rai University offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and BCA. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as MBA/PGDM, M.Sc. and MCA. Jharkhand Rai University courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for Jharkhand Rai University courses stands around INR 60,000 to 5,20,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Jharkhand Rai University (JRU).

review_content.Placements: In our college, there are around 500 students in our batch. Recruiting companies for our course are Tata, Amazon, etc. All students got internships from our college. The highest salary package offered in our course is around 9 LPA - 11 LPA LPA. The average salary package offered in our course is around 6 LPA - 7 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities in our institute are not more. Our college provides students with many facilities. There is no Wi-Fi. Air-conditioned classrooms are not available. They give students many things like a library, labs, digital classrooms, etc. The quality of our hostel is good. The mess and canteen are good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, college is good. Teachers and faculty members are so nice and supportive.

review_content.Placements: 50% of them are placed on campus, otherwise off campus. Package offered is between 2-12 LPA. Wipro, Capgemini, Tech Mahindra, etc. are the top recruiters. Some other big companies and also banking institutions like ICICI, Axis and others are recruiting. Internships are mainly based on students preferences, like duration, stupend, paid or unpaid, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Everything is good as per fee structure but not so cherished infrastructure. Hostel quality is what I didn't like; obviously, the food after a few months of admission but according to the fee, which is 80k and 1 lakh for 4 students and 2 students per year, that is fine .

faqs.answer: No, After completing LLB you become a lawyer, however, you are still not an advocate and hence cannot practice law. To become an advocate and to practice law as a profession, you mandatorily need to clear the All India Bar Examination (AIBE). After qualifying AIBE, one can practice law as a full fledged profession.
faqs.question: Q: Can I become a lawyer after completing my LLB?

faqs.answer: No, you cannot become a lawyer without a Law degree. You mandatorily need to obtain degrees such as BA/BCom/BSc/BBA LLB or LLB in order to be a lawyer in India. To become a lawyer, one must first complete three-year or five-year LLB from a recognised university and possess degree certificate. Then, they must enrol themselves in local Bar Council of the concerned state and enrolled as an advocate. Within two years of the enrolment, they must appear and clear AIBE in order to be eligible to practise anywhere in India.
faqs.question: Q: Can I start a law practice without a Law degree or become a lawyer?

answer.text: The salary prospects in the Law profession are based on the job role, position, employer, experience, and skills. Also, in India, Lawyers are generally paid based on the cases they handle; the number of full-time hired Advocates is less. You'll find some full-time hired Advocates in MNCs or in government organizations only; the remaining ones work more as consultants. individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: My college information and fee structure.

content.Placements: Placements are good, but 7th-semester students are not eligible for campus placements. Here, companies like TCS, Tech Mahindra, and others visit. Around 80-90% of students get placed every year. My plan is to be placed in a good company.
content.Infrastructure: My college provides us with a cafeteria, canteen, library, and many other facilities. Hostel timings are from 6:00 AM to 5:00 PM. Famous places around our university include Marasalli Hill and a few places, but there are not too many because our institute is located in a very outside area.

individual_reviews.title: I'm dissatisfied with the college placements, but the infrastructure and facilities are really good.

The student internship passing percentage is 65%, and the offered companies are Wipro. Software Developer and Application Learning and Development are the most common roles.
content.Infrastructure: Labs, classrooms, canteen, library, and medical facilities are provided. The syllabus for the college placements is good, and the infrastructure and faculty of the Science department are also good. There are some issues with campus connectivity.

individual_reviews.title: Jharkhand Rai University (JRU).

The highest salary package offered in our course is around 9 LPA - 11 LPA LPA. The average salary package offered in our course is around 6 LPA - 7 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities in our institute are not more. Our college provides students with many facilities. There is no Wi-Fi. Air-conditioned classrooms are not available. They give students many things like a library, labs, digital classrooms, etc. The quality of our hostel is good. The mess and canteen are good.

individual_reviews.title: Overall, college is good. Teachers and faculty members are so nice and supportive.

content.Placements: 50% of them are placed on campus, otherwise off campus. Package offered is between 2-12 LPA. Wipro, Capgemini, Tech Mahindra, etc. are the top recruiters. Some other big companies and also banking institutions like ICICI, Axis and others are recruiting. Internships are mainly based on students preferences, like duration, stupend, paid or unpaid, etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: It is one of the best colleges in Jharkhand.

content.Placements: Approximately 90% of students got placed in our course. The highest salary package offered was 12.4 LPA. The lowest salary package offered was 2.8 LPA. The average salary package offered was 5.7 LPA. The top recruiting companies were Wipro, Extramarks, and Tata. In this college, teachers work hard on students and build their confidence.

The laboratory was better. Hostel rooms were good. Our campus was free from ragging. The mess was great. Canteen was also average. First aid box was also available.

admission_overview.college_name: Jharkhand Rai University Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

paragraphs: Admission at Jharkhand Rai University are both merit and entrance-based as per the course. Students are offered programmes at UG, PG and After 10th level. These courses are offered in full time mode. To get admission inJharkhand Rai University, students must meet the eligibility. The applications are accepted online. Some of the accepted entrance tests include CUET, Jharkhand Polytechnic, and CBSE 12th, and more. For merit-based admissions, scores in last qualifying exam are the criteria. See below more insights on admissions forJharkhand Rai University courses:

courses_data.name: Jharkhand Rai University B.E. / B.Tech Admission 2025
courses_data.description: TheB.E. / B.TechatJharkhand Rai Universityis a 4 years programme offered to the students in the field of Engineering. Admission to this course is offered based on a valid score in CUET, CBSE 12th, and JAC 12th. Students can choose from 2 specialisations such as Mining Engineering and Computer Science Engineering among others. To complete the Jharkhand Rai University admission process for the 2025 batch, selected candidates must pay the applicable course fee ofINR 3,20,000.

faqs.question: Can I become a lawyer after completing my LLB?
faqs.answer: No, After completing LLB you become a lawyer, however, you are still not an advocate and hence cannot practice law.To become an advocate and to practice law as a profession, you mandatorily need to clear theAll India Bar Examination (AIBE). After qualifying AIBE, one can practice law as a full fledged profession.

faqs.question: Can I start a law practice without a Law degree or become a lawyer?
faqs.answer: No, you cannot become a lawyer without a Law degree.You mandatorily need to obtain degrees such as BA/BCom/BSc/BBA LLB or LLB in order to be a lawyer in India. To become a lawyer, one must first complete three-year or five-year LLB from a recognised university and possess degree certificate. Then, they must enrol themselves in local Bar Council of the concerned state and enrolled as an advocate. Within two years of the enrolment, they must appear and clear AIBE in order to be eligible to practise anywhere in India.

hostel_campus.college_name: Jharkhand Rai University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: My college information and fee structure.
reviews.review_text: My college provides us with a cafeteria, canteen, library, and many other facilities. Hostel timings are from 6:00 AM to 5:00 PM. Famous places around our university include Marasalli Hill and a few places, but there are not too many because our institute is located in a very outside area.

reviews.review_heading: I'm dissatisfied with the college placements, but the infrastructure and facilities are really good.
reviews.review_text: Labs, classrooms, canteen, library, and medical facilities are provided. The syllabus for the college placements is good, and the infrastructure and faculty of the Science department are also good. There are some issues with campus connectivity.

reviews.review_heading: Jharkhand Rai University (JRU).
reviews.review_text: Facilities in our institute are not more. Our college provides students with many facilities. There is no Wi-Fi. Air-conditioned classrooms are not available. They give students many things like a library, labs, digital classrooms, etc. The quality of our hostel is good. The mess and canteen are good.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, college is good. Teachers and faculty members are so nice and supportive.
reviews.review_text:
Everything is good as per fee structure but not so cherished infrastructure. 
Hostel quality is what I didn't like; obviously, the food after a few months of admission but according to the fee, which is 80k and 1 lakh for 4 students and 2 students per year, that is fine .

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges in Jharkhand.
reviews.review_text: All facilities were available. The campus environment was good. Wi-Fi was enabled in our college. Classrooms were well-maintained. The library was also provided. The laboratory was better. Hostel rooms were good. Our campus was free from ragging. The mess was great. Canteen was also average. First aid box was also available.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members at this college are knowledgeable, so I recommend enrolling there.
reviews.review_text: There are numerous facilities available. The library is available. We have a computer lab, a B. Pharma lab, Wi-Fi, huge classrooms with projectors, and many more facilities. The canteen is available for students and faculty members.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Jharkhand Rai University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our campus is good. The campus consists of four buildings in total. All departments are located in different buildings. In the hostel, there were four people sharing a room, which cost Rs. 30000 per semester. Everyone has their own locker, and every room has an attached bathroom. The hostel has a common hall and a common balcony. The food provided is not that good. They kept serving rice every time. The registration form for the hostel is to be filled in at the time of admi...

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it's a good college for me to make my career.
reviews.review_text: We have 2 campuses among which, 1 is fully developed and the another one is under construction. In the upcoming 2 years, it's going to have a great infrastructure. Being an agriculture student, we have so many facilities and a large amount of field for practical work which is going to help us a lot.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a good college.
reviews.review_text: It has good labs, a good library, good classrooms, and full Wi-Fi connectivity. The hostel is very clean, and the quality of the food served is also good. The canteen, medical facilities, sports, and games are also good. Hostelers are very good. In our hostel, various food options are available. All sports are available. There is a very good friendly atmosphere in the college.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for the BBA course in Ranchi.
reviews.review_text: The college has every facility and infrastructure. Every important department is available here. It has a library, many classrooms, 2 computer labs, and a wonderful cafeteria. I did not stay in the hostel, and we are not allowed to go over there. The infrastructure of the hostel is good, but I do not know much about food.

reviews.review_heading: It is good for students to pursue higher studies in budget and with scholarships.
reviews.review_text: A computer lab, a library, mess and hostel facilities are available here. There is a huge building for academics. A canteen is available, with every food item. Students can stay in hostels.

reviews.review_heading: It is a best college for a middle class student to study higher studies.
reviews.review_text: It has the worst college hostel, do not join in the college hostel. It is better to take some private hostel or room near the college. Library is good. Labs are good. Our canteen is not good. Some sports are there on the ground.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is very good for studies.
reviews.review_text: The college provides all the facilities like classrooms, library, sports etc. Medical facilities and Wi-Fi were not available. Quality of classrooms and labs was good enough for study purpose. Quality of food in the canteen was good. Hostel rooms were good.

reviews.review_heading: Giving opportunities to learn to the poor class of our society.
reviews.review_text: It has a well infrastructure which is of 3 floors. The classrooms are well maintained. The building has also a small ground and a canteen. There is also hostel facilities for boys and girls. Although this building is rented. But the university administration has making its own campus according to the norms of UGC and it has running the classes of B.Sc.  Agriculture there. It has planned to make a well infrastructure university and it is doing that in its best possible way.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with my university, and this is good in this range.
reviews.review_text: Here, we have good classrooms with projectors, with long-range overhead Wi-Fi. There are physics, chemistry, and agricultural labs. For engineering students, we have workshops, engineering labs as well as the best faculty to facilitate ourselves. The canteen is rich and full of good and tasty foods. Hostels are of both types. There are dormitory as well as flats. There is a library handling 5,000 books with different writers. Here, we have medical facilities, and we have an MBBS doctor along wit...

college_info.intro:
JNTU Hyderabad consists several departments, including the Department of Computer Science and Engineering, the Department of Electrical Engineering and others. JNTU Hyderabad offers many UG, PG, and PhD courses.
The BTech and MTech programs given at Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University Hyderabad are very popular with students. The institute offers four-year BTech programme and two-year MTech programme in different specialisations. The popularity of the programs is linked to their syllabus, which has been developed and upgraded to better the knowledge of students in various branches of engineering and technology. JNTU Hyderabad aims at development of students and helps them to develop technical competencies as well as various soft skills required to target core-industry roles. The industry-institute relations established by JNTU Hyderabad give students with the opportunity to undergo various training programmes organised by industry partners. JNTU Hyderabad also offers placement assistance to students and helps them get placed in top companies. The notable JNTU Hyderabad recruiters include Zomato, Amazon, Microsoft, Goldman Sachs, Morgan Stanley, and Google, among others. Check the popular programmes offered at JNTU Hyderabad, along with their fee structure and eligibility criteria in the following table:

reviews_list.review_title: Institute of Aeronautical Engineering College is above average.

review_content.Placements: Approximately 280 students are there in my course. Cognizant is the recruiting company for our course. I don't know about top roles, but mostly everyone got basic roles. The highest package offered to our course is 21 LPA and the lowest package is 4 LPA. Mostly, around 25 percent of students got internship in Cognizant and Juspay.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure for our course are average. There is no air conditioning, the seating arrangements are poor, but the classrooms are clean. The rooms can be rated 7 on a scale of 1 to 10. The food is good, they cook non-veg thrice a week, and the snacks are good too.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Super explanation, good academics, support facilities, decent placement, and active campus life.

review_content.Placements: I belong to B.Tech batch where a significant number of students are successfully placed through campus recruitment. Around 65 to 75 percent of students from our board secured placement. The highest package offered is approximately 10 to 12 LPA, while the lowest package is around three LPA and the average package stood at nearly 4.5 LPA. Some of the top recruiting companies of our college include Infosys, Wipro, and Tech Mahindra. Nearly 50 to 60 students also received internship opportunities. The top role offered to the student weight software.

review_content.Placements: Nearly 70% of the students are placed in the campus drives, and the highest salary offered by the college is 15 LPA, and the lowest salary offered is 3 LPA. Many top recruiting companies are offering jobs in college for students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has good infrastructure, and it provides all facilities for the students of each branch. Wi-Fi facilities are available for both students and faculty. course_faqs.question: Is MCA a two-year or three-year course in JNTUH?
course_faqs.answer: MCA at JNTUH is a 2 to 3-year course, divided into six semesters. This course is offered also offered CBCS by the affiliated colleges.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for MBA in JNTUH?
overview_faqs.answer: MBA is offered nearly through 140 JNTUH-affiliated colleges. The total tuition fee ranges between INR 46,000 and INR 6.37 lakh. However, it must be noted that the mentioned fee is as per the data sourced through unofficial sources. Hence, is subject to change.

overview_faqs.question: What is hostel fees for GATE qualified candidates at JNTUH?
overview_faqs.answer: The hostel fee at Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Hyderabad varies between INR 2,000 - INR 3,000. In the hostel, there are a maximum of 5 people per room. Only shared bathrooms are accessible. As for caution deposit, it depends on where you are from. If you've got in through EAMCET, it's INR 10,000, and if you're from other states, it's somewhere between INR 20,000 - INR 22,000.

review_summary.college_name: JNTUH Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Above average college and to be improved in some aspects.

content.Placements: The highest package is in Amazon of 46 LPA. Companies like Amazon, Pega, Zeta, Cisco, Wipro, Infosys, TCS, Salesforce, Cognizant, HSBC and so on, up to 20 companies, visit the college. Courses offered are CSE (AI & ML, DA, IoT, CSE), IT, ECE, EEE, CE, ME. An average of 30 percent of students are placed every year from all branches. The average package is 3.5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The college consists of central library, canteen, placement & training cell, girls hostel, boys hostel, auditorium, gym, workshops for ME and CE, park in middle, practice nets, 2 blocks for all departments with all lab equipment and large ground. Health center with 2 beds and Wi-Fi is provided in the whole campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good college but improve in providing placements.

content.Placements: Placements are provided in our college. Various companies such as Google, Wipro, Infosys, Oracle, etc., come for conducting placement drives. I think maybe 60 to 80 percent of students get placements in our college. Some students in the 4th year get internships also.
content.Infrastructure: College provides hostel for both boys and girls. The facilities provided in our college are good. Food is clean and healthy. Canteen, Library, Indoor and outdoor games facilities are also available. Canteen contains good food at reasonable price. Wi-Fi facilities are also available at our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Institute of Aeronautical Engineering College is above average.

content.Placements: Approximately 280 students are there in my course. Cognizant is the recruiting company for our course. I don't know about top roles, but mostly everyone got basic roles. The highest package offered to our course is 21 LPA and the lowest package is 4 LPA. Mostly, around 25 percent of students got internship in Cognizant and Juspay.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure for our course are average. There is no air conditioning, the seating arrangements are poor, but the classrooms are clean. The rooms can be rated 7 on a scale of 1 to 10. The food is good, they cook non-veg thrice a week, and the snacks are good too.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Super explanation, good academics, support facilities, decent placement, and active campus life.

content.Placements: I belong to B.Tech batch where a significant number of students are successfully placed through campus recruitment. Around 65 to 75 percent of students from our board secured placement. The highest package offered is approximately 10 to 12 LPA, while the lowest package is around three LPA and the average package stood at nearly 4.5 LPA. Some of the top recruiting companies of our college include Infosys, Wipro, and Tech Mahindra. Nearly 50 to 60 students also received internship opportunities. The top role offered to the student weight software.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Biomedical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: BVRIT is one of the top engineering colleges in Hyderabad.

content.Placements: Nearly 70% of the students are placed in the campus drives, and the highest salary offered by the college is 15 LPA, and the lowest salary offered is 3 LPA. Many top recruiting companies are offering jobs in college for students.
content.Infrastructure: The college has good infrastructure, and it provides all facilities for the students of each branch. Wi-Fi facilities are available for both students and faculty. Sports, games, mess, canteen, medical facilities, library, and classrooms are all available on the campus.

admission_overview.college_name: JNTUH Admissions 2025: Dates, Fee, Eligibility, Selection & Application Process

paragraphs: JNTUH admission 2025isopenfor various courses.JNTU offers UG, PG and PhD-level courses. It offers various popular courses such as BTech, BPharma, MTech, MPharm, MCA, PhD, etc. under various disciplines. JNTUH  entrance basedadmissions with the institute accepting scores of state/ national-level entrancetests, such asTS EAMCET, TS ICET, GATE, etc. Upon selection, candidates are invited forcounselling.JNTUHhas over423 affiliated collegesspread over Telangana. Read on more about JNTUH admission 2025 in the following article.

JNTUH hasfourengineering Colleges, located inHyderabad, Kondagattu, Manthani, and Sultanpur. It offersBTechprogrammes in24 streams, and MTech Programmes in 68 streams. These courses are offered in full-time mode. At present, the university has become a major institute providing quality technical education in Telangana. Check below  the JNTUH admission 2025 details:

JNTUH offers courses in the domains of Engineering, Science, Humanities etc. Candidates seeking admission must  ensure that they are eligible for the preferred course before applying. Admission to MTech, MBA, and MCA is based on GATE, GPAT and ICET scores, while MSc admission is granted based on the entrance test conducted by JNTU. Chcek below the eligibility and selection criteria forJNTUH courses:
Eligibility
Class 12 from a recognised board withPhysicsand Mathematics as compulsory subjects with 45% aggregate or Aspirants with a 3-year diploma and a valid ECET rank
UG from a recognised university
TS ICET+ Counselling
BTech/BE degree
GPAT orGATE+ Counselling
Class 12 pass with Physics andChemistryas compulsory subjects along with Mathematics/Biology
BCA degree OR equivalent from a recognised university
Bachelor's degree with 50% aggregate (unofficial)
BPharm degree from a recognised university
Pass Class 12

JNTUH fee is broken down into multiple components, such as tuition fee, hostel fee and one-time fee. The components in the total fee vary with the course selected by the students. However, the overall tuition fee for JNTUH ranges between INR 25,000 and INR 5 lakh.Coming to affordability, It's among the causes of the many students who drop out of college or with a degree. While student loans and scholarships have made education more affordable, there are still requirements that must be met in order to qualify, which might be difficult to meet. Find belowJNTUH feesalong with the salary package for top courses:
Note: Above information is taken from official website and may change.

JNT University seat intake may vary depending upon the course type and number of specialisations available.  The number of seats available in BTech is60 for eachspecialisation. Candidates must appear for the entrance exam and obtain a valid score for the desired course. Check out the below table to learn about seat intake for the popular courses of JNTUH:
Note: Above information is taken fromofficial websiteand may change.

JNTU follows the smae procedure for admissions every year. Admission is accepted as per the guidelines prescribed by TSCHE and JNTUH. The admission process involves an application procedure, shortlisting of students, merit list release, counselling, and seat allotment. The detailed stages for JNTUH course admissions 2025 are as follows:
1 -  Application Process

JNTUH application process is conducted in online mode. Candidates have to on the official website of the university for courses such as BBA, PhD, MTech, etc. However, for courses such as BTech, MBA, MCA, etc., candidates must apply on the official website of the conducting body of the respective entrance exam

JNTUH shortlists students based on their scores in the respective accepted entrance exams such as TS EAMCET, GATE, GPAT, etc. The course-wise merit lists are released by the state-level exam conducting bodies, such as for MBA and MCA, TS ICET publishes merit lists. For admission to courses based on merit or national-level exams, the university shall release a merit list itself. Read more about the JNTUH Merit Listhere.

After the merit list release, selected students are called for counselling rounds. For MBA and MCA, the counselling is conducted by the Telangana State Council of Higher Education (TSCHE), which isTS ICET Counselling. Likewise, for admission to the BTech course,TS EAMCET Counsellingtakes place.
As per the round of counselling, seats are allotted to the eligible students. Further, the selected students can confirm their admission by paying the course fees.
There are more than 423 colleges affiliated with the Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University Hyderabad. A few of the colleges are mentioned in the following table:

faqs.question: Who is eligible for BTech at JNTUH?
faqs.answer: Candidates willing to get admission to BTech at JNTUH must fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria. Aspirants who passed Class 12 from a recognised board with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects with 45% aggregate or Aspirants with a 3-year Diploma and a valid ECET rank are eligible to apply for admission to BTech at JNTUH. Only those who fulfil this minimum educational requirements will be able to appear for TS EAMCET exam.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to JNTU for BTech?
faqs.answer: To get admission to a four-year BTech course, candidates must fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria in the first place. Admission to BTech is entirely entrance-based. Candidates are offered admission based on a valid score obtained in TS EAMCET exam. This is a state-level entrance exam conducted by Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University Hyderabad on behalf of Telangana State Council of Higher Education (TSCHE). Further, candidates who qualify for this exam are called for TS EAMCET counselli

faqs.question: What is the accepted entrance exam for BTech admission at JNTUH?
faqs.answer: JNTUH accepts state-level entrance exams - Engineering, Agriculture & Medicine Common Entrance Test (EAMCET). This test is conducted under the guidelines of TSCHE. It is compulsory for students to have a valid TS EAMCET score to take admission. Candidates who qualify for this exam will be eligible to appear for EAMCET counselling process. Check here the guidelines toapply for TS EAMCET exam.

faqs.question: Can I apply for MBA at JNTUH without an entrance examination?
faqs.answer: No, for admission to MBA at JNTUH, an aspirant must have a valid TS Integrated Common Entrance Test (ICET) score. Only the students with an exam score are shortlisted and called for counselling following which seats are allotted. There is no other way to get admission to a full-time MBA course at JNTUH.

placement_data.title: JNTUH Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: According to JNTUH NIRF report 2024, the median package offered during JNTUH BTech and MTech placements 2023 were INR 6.25 LPA and INR 8 LPA , respectively. Further, a total of 1100 students were placed from the BTech program. In total 600 students were placed from the MTech program during placements 2023.

The highest and lowest package offered during Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University Hyderabad BTech placements 2022 were INR 44 LPA and INR 3.5 LPA, respectively . The highest package offered during JNTUH Integrated BTech and MTech Dual Degree placements 2022 were INR 46 LPA. Further, the highest package offered during JNTUH MTech and MCA placements 2022 were INR 10.5 LPA and INR 6 LPA, respectively.

faqs.question: How many students are placed during JNTUH placements?
faqs.answer: According to JNTUH NIRF report 2024, the course-wise number of students placed over the past three years during JNTUH placements is presented below: Course Placement Rate (2021) Placement Rate (2022) Placement Rate (2023) BTech Total students: 1072 Students placed: 549 Total students: 1150 Students placed: 589 Total students: 1220 Students placed: 1100 MTech Total students: 379 Students placed: 195 Total students: 402 Students placed: 286 Total students: 720 Students placed: 600

faqs.question: What is the highest salary in Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University Hyderabad?
faqs.answer: According to JNTUH NIRF report 2024, the median package offered during JNTUH BTech and MTech placements 2023 stood at INR 6.25 LPA and INR 8 LPA , respectively. Further, a total of 1100 students were placed out of 1220 students during BTech placements 2023 whereas 600 students out of 720 students were placed during MTech placements 2023. Earlier, the course-wise key highlights of JNTUH placements 2022 are presented below: Particulars Placement Statistics (2022) BTech highest package INR 44 LPA Integrated BTech and MTech highest package INR 46 LPA MTech highest package INR 10.5 LPA MCA highest package INR 6 LPA Note: The data shown above is of JNTUH’s University College of Engineering, Science & Technology.

faqs.question: What is the median package of JNTUH College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: According to the NIRF Report available on the official website, the JNTUH College of Engineering median package offered to a BTech student is INR 6.25 LPA . Further, the median package offered to an MTech student stands at INR 8 LPA . The top recruiters at JNTUH College of Engineering include CommVault, Amazon, Invesco, Mathworks, Darwin Box, Oracle, ION trading, TCS Ninja, Honeywell, Pega Systems, Quantum Analytics, AMD and many more. The key highlights of JNTUH College of Engineering placements 2023 are tabulated below: Particulars Placement Statistics 2023 No. of students placed 1100 Median Package (BTech) INR 6.25 LPA Median Package (MTech) INR 8 LPA

faqs.question: Can students get free seat in JNTU Hyderabad?
faqs.answer: At Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University (JNTU) in Hyderabad, one needs to fulfill one of the following requirements in order to be eligible for a free seat: 1) Category for the SC/ST: The annual income of your parents shall not exceed 2.5 lakhs. 2) Rank: A rank of less than 10,000 is required. 3) General category: You have to fall between 100 and 110. 4) Reserved category: 500 is the minimum rank required.

highlights.description: One of India’s top schools is JNTUH. Numerous national ranking agencies have continuously recognised it as one of the best institutes. According to the NIRF Ranking 2025, the institute has been awarded #81 rank in the University category, and #94 under Engineering. The institute is a top-ranked institute because of its equipped infrastructure and well-educated faculty. Check the article given below to know details around JNTUH rankings.

nirf.description:
Based on the rankings from NIRF, JNTUH outperformed numerous other institutes, securing a higher position, indicating that the institute is considered to be doing better in various factors evaluated by the NIRF ranking system. In the 'University' category, the institute's ranks have ascended when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, JNTUH climbed 70 ranks to #81 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
It has been observed that the institute has displayed a decreasing trend in the 'Engineering' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, JNTUH fell 6 ranks to #94 rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
Explore the most recent rankings from other ranking bodies and their respective categories below.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by ACE Engineering CollegeReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Above average college and to be improved in some aspects.
reviews.review_text: The college consists of central library, canteen, placement & training cell, girls hostel, boys hostel, auditorium, gym, workshops for ME and CE, park in middle, practice nets, 2 blocks for all departments with all lab equipment and large ground. Health center with 2 beds and Wi-Fi is provided in the whole campus.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Nalla Malla Reddy Engineering CollegeReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Good college but improve in providing placements.
reviews.review_text: College provides hostel for both boys and girls. The facilities provided in our college are good. Food is clean and healthy. Canteen, Library, Indoor and outdoor games facilities are also available. Canteen contains good food at reasonable price. Wi-Fi facilities are also available at our college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Institute of Aeronautical EngineeringReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Institute of Aeronautical Engineering College is above average.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure for our course are average. There is no air conditioning, the seating arrangements are poor, but the classrooms are clean. The rooms can be rated 7 on a scale of 1 to 10. The food is good, they cook non-veg thrice a week, and the snacks are good too.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Teegala Krishna Reddy Engineering CollegeReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Super explanation, good academics, support facilities, decent placement, and active campus life.
reviews.review_text: The department has good infrastructure and well-maintained facilities to support both academic and practical learning. The campus has high-speed Wi-Fi, which is accessible in classrooms, laboratories, and hostels. The laboratory is well occupied with modern instrument systems and the modern instruments and relevant and the required software relevant to the course curricular classroom. Start PCS well-ventilated and supported with Smartboard and projectors for effective teaching.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by BV Raju Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: BVRIT is one of the top engineering colleges in Hyderabad.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure, and it provides all facilities for the students of each branch. Wi-Fi facilities are available for both students and faculty. Sports, games, mess, canteen, medical facilities, library, and classrooms are all available on the campus.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Anurag UniversityReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Very good college, not as much as IITs or NITs.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good in this college compared to other colleges. Wi-Fi is also available. Also, they provide a canteen which is very good, but it is expensive and has a limited quantity. Hostels are also provided up to 1 lac fees per year with AC and without AC. The canteen food is good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Anurag UniversityReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: My review of my college, Anurag University.
reviews.review_text: Anurag University's infrastructure is really good, with beautiful new, unique paintings on the walls of the blocks, and the building design is different, with minimal space for corridors. The college grounds are for different sports and games.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Sri Indu Institute of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: The best college for students.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available in our course are really good except for Wi-Fi. The quality of facilities in our hostel is very nice, and the quality of food available in the mess and canteen is very good. All food items are available with cool drinks. All the medical facilities, sports and games are available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Institute of Aeronautical EngineeringReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because of the faculty and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is medium level for the college grades. Good classroom. Nice infrastructure. Qualified faculty. Well-equipped laboratory. Nice library. Different books are available in the library.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Institute of Aeronautical EngineeringReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because of the faculty and good placements. Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is medium level for the college grades. Good classroom. Nice infrastructure. Qualified faculty. Well-equipped laboratory. Nice library. Different books are available in the library.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by BV Raju Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and facilities on campus.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is excellent, and as long here facilities here are excellent. Wi-Fi facilities are provided by the campus for both students and faculty as well. Here, food quality is good and very tasty in campus hostels, the fee for hostels is Rs. 90,000 per year.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by BV Raju Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: I’m absolutely satisfied with my college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of the college is very good and best. All courses are available on campus. The infrastructure of the college is good. Mess, canteen, labs, classrooms, library, Wi-Fi facilities, and digital boards are all provided by the college.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure of the college is good.

faqs.answer: The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. content.Placements: Around 60 students got placed. The salary package ranges between 2.5 LPA- 5 LPA. Students are placed at hospitals such as Max Healthcare, Fortis Healthcare, Apollo Hospital, and Metro Hospital. Meanwhile, in diagnostic centers such as Dr. Lal PathLabs, SRL Diagnostics, and Thyrocare. Students also have opportunities in research and development, with pharmaceutical companies and technological industries. Other sectors for placements include private clinics, nursing homes, and blood banks. All students secured internships in many hospitals. Because that's the paramedical line of Shri Khushal Das (SKD) University in Hanumangarh. The college has strong ties with the leading hospitals, diagnostic labs, and corporations for internships and placements. Popular recruiters include Fortis, Apollo, and SRL Diagnostics for healthcare students. Special features are internship programs are integrated into many courses, providing practical exposure and boosting job readiness.

content.Placements: The placement of Shri Khushal Das University is too good every year; 2 or 3 drives are organized here. faqs.question: Does SKD University offer better placements than Indira Gandhi University?
faqs.answer: Indira Gandhi National Open University (IGNOU) does not offer campus placements. However, IGNOU BCA graduates have a placement rate of over 60%, with an average package of INR 2.5 LPA. SKD University, also known as Shri Khushal Das University, has a good placement record. The university has over 600 recruitment partners, and most students find jobs at leading companies. In 2022, almost 90% of CSE students were placed in companies like Wipro and Accenture. According to Shiksha, the average salary package offered at SKD University is around 4 LPA.

review_summary.college_name: Dr. Vasantrao Pawar Medical College, Hospital and Research Center Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Our building is good and hospital is also fine. The clinical is not good.

content.Placements: MBBS doctors are less and patients are more. So does not depend on this college, anyone who is an MBBS graduate is sure to get a job. In government hospitals, salary starts from Rs 60,000 per month to 1 LPA. Private practice is conducted and varies from person to person.
content.Infrastructure: Our college and hospital buildings are good, high class library with air-conditioner, fast Wi-Fi, and good auditorium classrooms are provided. The biggest problem is the hostel. The rooms are small with 2-3 kept in same room. The mess food is the worst food anyone can ever have. Boys hostel warden is friendly, but girls hostel warden makes students life.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the faculty staff, very good placement and infrastructure.

content.Placements: Almost 95 percent placement in various big government hospital and private hospital. The highest package is 12 lacs per annum, the lowest is 6 lacs and average package is 8 lacs per annum. Top government hospital and various public health centres in rural areas. 100 percent placement in government and private hospital. Medical officer, practicing doctor and health inspector.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, library and classroom are available for study purpose. Labs are very clean and well settled specimens are available. Quality of food is above average in mess, turf volleyball and basketball ground are available for the fitness of the students. Carrom and table tennis are available in the college for indoor games.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: It has value for your money with good education and quite equipped hospital.

content.Placements: The internship duration is for one year in the same hospital This offered a good learning experience, especially during COVID times. Each department is well-equipped with all the modern facilities and very cooperative staff. It also offers post-graduate courses in various departments.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel is quite average, and so is the mess. But the canteen is much better after the renovation. There is a turf, a basketball, and a tennis court as well. Every year, an annual function is held on the college campus comprising various activities, be it in sports culture as well as academics.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good for the UG curriculum.

content.Placements: There is an excellent percentage of students getting selected for NEET PG from our college. Overall, a very good package for pass-out students. The knowledge gained from doing internships is very good. The overall performance in medical exams is good.
content.Infrastructure: There is a well-built infrastructure for the college as well as the hostel. Top-class classrooms are available with proper seating arrangements. The main thing is that the mess food is good. There is a separate space for overall sports and games, along with a well-built turf.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Amaltas Institute of Medical Science.

review_content.Placements: There are a total of 250 students in our batch. The college fee is very high, and it is 15.5 lakhs per year for the 5.5-year span of the MBBS course. Students get internships in the final year of the course, which is the fifth year, and work in college hospitals only.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is average, and it is not so well-developed. There is no Wi-Fi available for students either in college or in the hostel. The network is very bad. Labs are good with proper equipment. Classrooms are good too. The mess food is not great and there is no canteen in college. Medical facilities are great. It has good sports and games.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: It provides the best noble professional doctors.

review_content.Placements: Almost 100% of students from our course get placed. The highest salary package offered depends on you. The lowest salary package offered is 12 LPA, and the average salary package offered is 14 LPA. Companies like Apollo, Medanta, Aurobindo, and Bombay Hospital visit the college for placements. Almost 100% of students from our course get an internship. It depends on the performance you have done. It is a noble profession as doctors can heal all the world.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are many departments for study on the campus. You can study according to your need. There are 3 main subjects in the 1st year in anatomy, physiology, and biochemistry. All facilities are available in our college. The food served is good. It has good infrastructure and all sports facilities.
