review_summary.college_name: Amaltas Institute of Medical Science Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The great chapters of Amaltas.

content.Placements: MBBS 2023 batch contains 250 students. The 1st batch of Amaltas is 250. The previous batches are 150 only. Packages corresponding to government internships or the bond we'll be competing for the scholarship amount will be for 5 years. The package will be at least 12 LPA, depending upon the area of the posting. Internships are for the 1 year students. The stipend was Rs. 15,500 for the 2023 batch.
content.Infrastructure: I'm a day scholar hence I knew less about the hostel facilities. Overall grading of the hostel is fine but there is Wi-Fi and network issues. The mess services are average. How it will be called a mess if it does not provide 5-star services. Classrooms are air-conditioned. For sports, there are different courts.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: MBBS: A private college life.

content.Placements: The batch in my college consists of 250 students. Internships are available for all 250 students. Learning opportunities are present. Although being a private college, it is well-standardized. We could apply for jobs in private and government hospitals as MBBS graduates after the course.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure of the college are well-developed. We have 2 girls' hostels and 2 boys' hostels along with a seperate college building and hospital building. Hostels are well-furnished and have 2 seater rooms available. Each room is well-spaced along with washrooms.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Review of Amaltas Institute of Medical Science.

content.Placements: There are a total of 250 students in our batch. The college fee is very high, and it is 15.5 lakhs per year for the 5.5-year span of the MBBS course. Students get internships in the final year of the course, which is the fifth year, and work in college hospitals only.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is average, and it is not so well-developed. There is no Wi-Fi available for students either in college or in the hostel. The network is very bad. Labs are good with proper equipment. Classrooms are good too. The mess food is not great and there is no canteen in college. Medical facilities are great. It has good sports and games.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It provides the best noble professional doctors.

content.Placements: Almost 100% of students from our course get placed. The highest salary package offered depends on you. The lowest salary package offered is 12 LPA, and the average salary package offered is 14 LPA. Companies like Apollo, Medanta, Aurobindo, and Bombay Hospital visit the college for placements. Almost 100% of students from our course get an internship. It depends on the performance you have done. It is a noble profession as doctors can heal all the world.
content.Infrastructure: There are many departments for study on the campus. You can study according to your need. There are 3 main subjects in the 1st year in anatomy, physiology, and biochemistry. All facilities are available in our college. The food served is good. It has good infrastructure and all sports facilities.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Review of Amaltas Institute of Medical Science.

content.Placements: There are no such placements and packages for MBBS pass out. But still, an MBBS pass out from Amaltas Institute of Medical Science can earn a minimum starting salary of Rs. 65,000 as a junior resident. But cracking PG and after further studies can earn as much needed.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is average. The campus has basic facilities, and infrastructure is also normal. The campus does not have an auditorium or a canteen. Almost all facilities are provided here. Transport facilities are also good. Bus facilities to all cities nearby are provided for free for students. Overall, it is in average condition. Our college is still developing. Further development will be seen in later years. The food provided in a mess is average. Hygiene is maintained. Still, much development is required. Special days need to be increased.

college_info.intro:
SP More College of Paramedical and Nursing courses include BSc and BPT as popular courses. Offered in affiliation with MSBVE and MUHS, SPM College BSc is available in full-time mode for the duration of 3 years. Similarly, the College offers a 4 year BPT in full-time mode with an annual intake of 75 students.
Admission to all the courses is based on merit. Therefore, candidates must secure a minimum aggregate in Class 12 with PCB. SPM College of Paramedical and Nursing offers BSc in various specialisation such as Operation Theater Technician (OTT), Medical Laboratory Technology (MLT), Radiology and Imaging Technology (RIT) and Optometry Technology (OPTO). For more details around SP More College of Paramedical and Nursing popular programmes, check out the table below:

The College offers these courses in UG, PG and Certificate level in full-time mode. The annual intake of all these courses range from 25 to 75 with the duration of the course varying from 1 year to 4 years. SPM College offers these courses in affiliation with MSBVE and MUHS. The College offers BSc and BPT as the flagship courses.

paragraphs: SPM College of Paramedical and Nursing Education admission 2025is both entrance and merit-based. The institute does not conduct entrance exams on its own but accepts entrance exam scores.SPM College of Paramedical and Nursing Educationoffers UG, PG, Certificate and Diploma courses in streams of the Medical field. Some popular medical courses offered are BSc in Medical Laboratory Technology, BSc in Operation Theater Technician, BSc in Optometry Technology and Bachelor's in Physiotherapy. Interested candidates can apply online on the official website of SPM College
Candidates must fulfil the eligibility criteria to apply for the entrance test. Below areSPM College of Paramedical and Nursing Education coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Common Eligibility
Selection Criteria

SPM College of Paramedical and Nursing Educationis based on entrance exams and merit. Shortlisted candidates also have to go through further. Before applying for a course, the aspirants must check the prescribed eligibility criteria. The step-by-step admission procedure is further explained below:
Step 1:The application process is online. Candidates must fill in their details, including name, email and phone number.In some cases, an application fee may be required.

Step 2:SPM College of Paramedical and Nursing Education evaluates the application forms of the candidates to confirm eligibility. The selection of SPM College of Paramedical and Nursing Education Studies courses is based on entrance exam scores as well as merit. For some courses, such as BBA and BCA the selection is done based on merit.
Step 3:The institute informs the selected aspirants of their admission status. Once shortlisted, candidates need to pay the SPM College of Paramedical and Nursing Education to confirm their seat.

college_info.college_name: Directorate of Distance Education, Alagappa University: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements, Reviews

highlights.summary: Directorate of Distance Education, Alagappa University, is located in Karaikudi, Tamil Nadu. Established in 1992, it is a public institute. Directorate of Distance Education, Alagappa University provides 84 UG, PG and Certificate courses in 26 specialisations, namely Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Botany, C / C++, Chemistry and Computer Science. Theses programmes are offered in Part Time mode. MBA/PGDM, B.Sc., M.Sc., MCA and BCA are some of the courses offered at Directorate of Distance Education, Alagappa University. Some of the streams in which these courses are offered include Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Accounting & Commerce and Mass Communication & Media. The total fee at Directorate of Distance Education, Alagappa University ranges between INR 2,500 to 40,000. The average median package at Directorate of Distance Education, Alagappa University is INR 1,44,000. Directorate of Distance Education, Alagappa University offers all the infrastructural facilities to students.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBA in Hospital Management - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Hospitality at its best.

review_content.Placements: The highest package offered on our campus to any candidate for this particular year was ₹8,50,000 with an average package of ₹6,50,000. The university also has an amazing internship placement rate of 90%. The hotels that come for recruiting are Taj Hotels, ITC Hotels, and MakeMyTrip.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has a model restaurant for restaurant management training, and the classrooms are very well-maintained as they are kept neat and clean and are air-conditioned. The college is also connected throughout the campus. The hostel food is pathetic.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBA in Human Resource Management - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Thriving academic environment and vibrant campus life.

review_content.Placements: In our course, almost 100% of students get placed in different companies. The highest salary package offered by the companies is around 16 Lacs per annum, and the average salary package offered by the companies is 7 Lacs per annum, with the lowest salary package offered being 4 Lacs per annum. The top companies in our college are Google, Microsoft, and ICICI. Top roles offered are business executive, business development, and sales executive.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides good infrastructure. There are four computer labs to help students develop their skills. The classrooms are well-equipped with smartboards, projectors, and other equipment. The mess food is delicious and affordable. The canteen offers various food items at cheap prices. Wi-Fi connectivity is available on our college campus. There are various types of games available for students to play on the campus. There is a swimming pool facility available for the students.

faqs.answer: Directorate of Distance Education, Alagappa University has courses such as B.A., BBA, M.Sc., Certificate, UG Diploma, B.Ed, B.Sc., BCA, B.Com, B.Lib.I.Sc., M.A., MSW, MCA, M.Com, MBA/PGDM to offer. These courses are in the stream of Humanities & Social Sciences, Banking, Finance & Insurance, Science, IT & Software, Teaching & Education, Engineering, Accounting & Commerce, Business & Management Studies, Mass Communication & Media, Hospitality & Travel, Medicine & Health Sciences, Beauty & Fitness, Animation. Directorate of Distance Education, Alagappa University offers specializations such as B.A. specializations in Public Administration, English, M.Sc. specializations in Zoology, Mathematics, Computer Science, Chemistry, Physics, Botany, Microbiology, Home Science, Certificate specializations in C / C++, UG Diploma specializations in Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Cyber Security, B.Sc. specializations in Mathematics, Computer Science, M.A. specializations in English, Personnel Management, Early Childhood Care & Education (ECCE), and MBA/PGDM specializations in International Business, Project Management, HealthCare & Hospital, Human Resources, Retail, IT & Systems, Transport & Logistics, Finance, Sales & Marketing, Sports..

review_summary.college_name: Directorate of Distance Education Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBA in Human Resource Management - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: The college provides students with good placements and really good facilities.

content.Placements: 56% of students were placed in my course. The highest salary is 5.6 LPA and the lowest salary is 3.2 LPA. The top recruiting companies are TCS, Wipro, HSBC, and Infosys. The top roles offered by students are HR, BDE, and data analyst. 20% of students got internships in our field.
content.Infrastructure: The university has Wi-Fi systems for everyone, well-structured smart classrooms, a well-stocked library, and well-equipped labs. Hostel quality is good, the students are friendly , and the canteen food is hygienic for students. Sports and games are both provided by the college for students' refreshment. Medical facilities are also provided for emergency purposes.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. in English - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: My bachelor's degree was at Alagappa.

content.Placements: According to the 2023 placements, 80 to 90% of students were placed. It may include undergraduate and postgraduate final-year students. The highest package offered to them was 5 lakhs per annum, and the median package offered to them was nearly 3 lakhs per annum.
content.Infrastructure: Our university includes various courses for regular as well as irregular students. The infrastructure of our college is really like a hi-fi motel. And all the facilities available at our college are really superb. There is a very big library with individual rooms for study and searching.

individual_reviews.course: MBA in Hospital Management - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Hospitality at its best.

content.Placements: The highest package offered on our campus to any candidate for this particular year was ₹8,50,000 with an average package of ₹6,50,000. The university also has an amazing internship placement rate of 90%. The hotels that come for recruiting are Taj Hotels, ITC Hotels, and MakeMyTrip.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a model restaurant for restaurant management training, and the classrooms are very well-maintained as they are kept neat and clean and are air-conditioned. The college is also connected throughout the campus. The hostel food is pathetic.

individual_reviews.course: MBA in Human Resource Management - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Thriving academic environment and vibrant campus life.

content.Placements: In our course, almost 100% of students get placed in different companies. The highest salary package offered by the companies is around 16 Lacs per annum, and the average salary package offered by the companies is 7 Lacs per annum, with the lowest salary package offered being 4 Lacs per annum. The top companies in our college are Google, Microsoft, and ICICI. Top roles offered are business executive, business development, and sales executive.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides good infrastructure. There are four computer labs to help students develop their skills. The classrooms are well-equipped with smartboards, projectors, and other equipment. The mess food is delicious and affordable. The canteen offers various food items at cheap prices. Wi-Fi connectivity is available on our college campus. There are various types of games available for students to play on the campus. There is a swimming pool facility available for the students.

individual_reviews.course: MBA in Human Resource Management - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: The campus is too small and not much crowded.

content.Placements: 30–40 percent of students were placed in our department or course. The highest package is INR 10–12 lacs, the average package is INR 6–8 lacs, and the lowest package is INR 2-4 lacs. 30 percent of students got internships at our college. The top companies in our college are Google and Microsoft for the SDE role.
content.Infrastructure: In our college, the facilities provided to students are not that good or amazing. They also did not provide any internet connection in the classroom, labs or library. The quality of the food is not too good but it is hygienic and they also provide medical facilities.

admission_process.title: Directorate of Distance Education, Alagappa University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Directorate of Distance Education, Alagappa University admissionis based on both merit or exam scores of the candidates. Besides, Directorate of Distance Education, Alagappa University considers scores in ISC, CBSE 12th, and Tamilnadu 12th for admission to specific courses.Directorate of Distance Education, Alagappa Universityoffers courses at the UG, PG and Certificate levels.
The college offers UG programmes for 2 years - 3 years. For programmes at PG level, the duration is 1 year - 2 years.
The total tuition fee for UG programmes isINR 4,200 - 40,000. Likewise, the PG programmes fee isINR 3,300 - 40,000. Students can pay the fee amount via online or offline mode.
Please note that this fee information is obtained from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.

reviews.review_heading: The college provides students with good placements and really good facilities.
reviews.review_text: The university has Wi-Fi systems for everyone, well-structured smart classrooms, a well-stocked library, and well-equipped labs. Hostel quality is good, the students are friendly , and the canteen food is hygienic for students. Sports and games are both provided by the college for students' refreshment. Medical facilities are also provided for emergency purposes.

reviews.review_heading: My bachelor's degree was at Alagappa.
reviews.review_text: Our university includes various courses for regular as well as irregular students. The infrastructure of our college is really like a hi-fi motel. And all the facilities available at our college are really superb. There is a very big library with individual rooms for study and searching.

reviews.review_heading: Hospitality at its best.
reviews.review_text: The college has a model restaurant for restaurant management training, and the classrooms are very well-maintained as they are kept neat and clean and are air-conditioned. The college is also connected throughout the campus. The hostel food is pathetic.

reviews.review_heading: Thriving academic environment and vibrant campus life.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good infrastructure. There are four computer labs to help students develop their skills. The classrooms are well-equipped with smartboards, projectors, and other equipment. The mess food is delicious and affordable. The canteen offers various food items at cheap prices. Wi-Fi connectivity is available on our college campus. There are various types of games available for students to play on the campus. There is a swimming pool facility available for the students.

reviews.review_heading: The campus is too small and not much crowded.
reviews.review_text:
In our college, the facilities provided to students are not that good or amazing.
They also did not provide any internet connection in the classroom, labs or library. The quality of the food is not too good but it is hygienic and they also provide medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best universities for students.
reviews.review_text: Hostel rooms were spacious. Each hostel room had a bed, a fan, a table, a chair, and a cupboard. Our campus was Wi-Fi enabled. The food quality was excellent. They also provided food thrice a day.

My college is very good teaching method at my college is up to the mark. Staffs are friendly handling in our students. faqs.question: How many students are placed during Raj Kumar Goel Institute of Technology placements?

answer.text: Most of the companies start the placement process with a pre-placement talk that describes the job profile, the company's vision and the services provided by them. Students are advised to attend the PPT for the desired company as it is the base step of preparation for that particular company. Thereafter, prepare a decent resume highlighting your skills, academic background, and extra-curricular details. The most important step of the placement interview is the test conducted by the interviewer. Students should well prepare the Logical Reasoning, Verbal Ability, and Quantitative Awareness topics. Alongside this, prepare the basics of the core subject, depending upon the branch they are studying in. To excel in the GD round, try to initiate first and listen carefully to the point put forward by the other members.

overview_faqs.question: Is Raj Kumar Goel Institute of Technology (RKGIT) a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Raj Kumar Goel Institute of Technology (RKGIT) is a reputed institute for D.Pharma, B.Tech, MBA/PGDM, M.E./M.Tech, B.Pharma, M.Pharma, MCA, BBA. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Medicine & Health Sciences, Engineering, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Raj Kumar Goel Institute of Technology (RKGIT) has a review rating of 3.6 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 3.9 on campuslife, 3.4 on placements, 3.7 on faculty and 3.6 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Raj Kumar Goel Institute of Technology (RKGIT) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The college is good. I am totally satisfied and helpful for my studies.

content.Placements: 80 percent of students get placed easily. The average package offered ranges from 4-5 LPA, depending on students and performance. TCS, HCL, and Wipro are the top recruiting companies on the campus. These companies are also the top companies in India. 70 percent of students got internships easily. Roles like recruiters and engineers are offered here.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is excellent. The mess and canteen are average. Medical and sports facilities are amazing because the college director is very good at discipline and maintains all things easily and well. Hostels are also good with Wi-Fi. The net offered is smooth.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: I am happy with the faculty members. The infrastructure can be better, but facilities are good.

content.Placements: Placements are not very good here. Most of the students prefer off-campus placements, but it's true that getting off-campus placements is very tough and depends on all our skills. Here, we can get decent placements if we have good skills. But I will not prefer this college for placements.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are actually good here. Classrooms have smart board facilities, and air-conditioned classrooms are present with good infrastructure. Hostel rooms are actually very good with a gym facility. Many sports facilities are available here, like a basketball court, a badminton court, a football ground, a kho-kho ground, a cricket ground, etc.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: RKGIT has courses like BBA, BCA, and B.Tech. You must enrol in it.

content.Placements: The top roles offered in my course are junior engineer and many others. Roles like sales executive, customer support, data entry, and many more, including digital marketing, social media marketing, management, HR and many more. RKGIT is best for all the newcomers.
content.Infrastructure: Our college, Raj Kumar Goel Institute of Technology, has the best infrastructure in the whole Rajnagar extension area with the best faculty members, and it also has facilities like Wi-Fi, computer labs and many more things, like a canteen, much better medical facilities, sports and games.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Average in placements, good infrastructure and facilities, dissatisfied because of faculty members.

content.Placements: Overall, 65% of B.Teach students got placed successfully in recent placement drives. Some of the top recruiting companies for my course are HCL, TCS, Infosys, Tech Mahindra, Wipro, Paytm, etc., that visited our college for recruitment. The top roles offered by the companies in our course were Senior Data Analyst, Senior Software Developer, and Junior Data Scientist. One of the students got a package of 32 LPA in the 2024 placements, and the lowest package was 2.7 LPA. Overall, 80% of the students got internships in companies like Airtel, TCS, HCL, Tech Mahindra, etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: RKGIT: A reasonable choice for B.Tech.

content.Placements: Placements of RKGIT are not good. Mostly, service-based and sales companies visit the campus. Only 2-3 companies offer more than 10 LPA. The average package offered in RKGIT ranges from 4-5 LPA, and the highest package offered is 34 LPA (2025). Recently, a company visited the RKGIT named Trilogy with a package of 32 LPA. In the internship, the stipend offered is Rs. 75,000 per month.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is average. The classroom infrastructure is not maintained. Only the H block classroom infrastructure has a smart board. In the main building for CSE, AIML, IT, ECE, and other branches, the infrastructure is not maintained. No Wi-Fi facility is provided by the college. It is only for hostellers in the hostel room. Wi-Fi is provided at a 50 Mbps speed in a laptop, but it is not provided for mobile devices.

admission_overview.college_name: Raj Kumar Goel Institute of Technology (RKGIT) Admission 2025: Application, Eligibility, Courses, Fee, Dates

admission_process.title: Raj Kumar Goel Institute of Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Raj Kumar Goel Institute of Technology admission 2025 is based on entrance exams.Raj Kumar Goel Institute of Technologyoffers BTech, MTech, MBA and MCA programmes at UG And PG levels. The BTech programme is offered in 12 specialisations, such as Computer Science & Engineering, Computer Science etc. The MBA programme is offered in six specialisations, some of them are Financial Management, Marketing Management, Human Resource Management etc.

Raj Kumar Goel Institute of Technology admission process 2025 is completely online. Candidates can visit the official website and register along with the payment of the registration fee. Details around the admission criteria and fees for allRKGIT coursesoffered by this institute are listed below:

Raj Kumar Goel Institute of Technology is open for applications in all its courses. To enter, the candidates need to complete the registration process. Here is how you can apply:Step 1:The application process is online. Candidates must fill in their details, including name, email, phone number, and work experience.In some cases, an application fee may be required.

Step 2:Raj Kumar Goel Institute of Technologyevaluates the application forms of the candidates to confirm eligibility. The selection ofRaj Kumar Goel Institute of TechnologyStudies courses is based on entrance exam scores, such as CUET, JEE Main. For some courses, such as BBA and BCA the selection is done on the basis of merit.
Step 3:The institute informs the selected aspirants of their admission status. Once shortlisted, candidates need to pay theRaj Kumar Goel Institute of Technology feeto confirm their seat.

faqs.question: What are the eligibility criteria for admission into the BTech CSE programme at RKGIT?
faqs.answer: Applicants should be class 12 passed in Physics, Chemistry, and Math as main courses with an aggregate of not less than 45%. faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in RKGIT with 75% in Class 12?
faqs.answer: Yes, direct admission is possible in RKGIT for merit-based programs like BBA and BCA with 75% Class 12 because these programs are not entrance exam-based. Admission is provided on academic marks, and students qualifying the eligibility can apply directly under the online admission procedure. But for BTech and MBA programmes, entrance exam marks like JEE Main and CUET are mandatory.

faqs.question: Can I get admission at RKGIT without an entrance exam?
faqs.answer: Yes, in BBA and BCA, there is merit-based admission, and marks in Class 12 are enough. But for BTech and MBA, entrance exams like JEE Main and CUET are required for admission.

faqs.question: How many seats are available for various courses offered at Raj Kumar Goel Institute of Technology (RKGIT)?
faqs.answer: Courses offerred by Raj Kumar Goel Institute of Technology (RKGIT) are approved by eminent Government bodies like PCI, AICTE. The combined seats available for courses offered at Raj Kumar Goel Institute of Technology (RKGIT) goes up to 1597.

faqs.question: How to prepare for Raj Kumar Goel Institute of Technology placement interviews?
faqs.answer: Most of the companies start the placement process with a pre-placement talk that describes the job profile, the company's vision and the services provided by them. Students are advised to attend the PPT for the desired company as it is the base step of preparation for that particular company. Thereafter, prepare a decent resume highlighting your skills, academic background, and extra-curricular details. The most important step of the placement interview is the test conducted by the interviewer. Students should well prepare the Logical Reasoning, Verbal Ability, and Quantitative Awareness topics. Alongside this, prepare the basics of the core subject, depending upon the branch they are studying in. To excel in the GD round, try to initiate first and listen carefully to the point put forward by the other members.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good. I am totally satisfied and helpful for my studies.

reviews.review_heading: I am happy with the faculty members. The infrastructure can be better, but facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: Average in placements, good infrastructure and facilities, dissatisfied because of faculty members.

reviews.review_heading: RKGIT: A reasonable choice for B.Tech.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average. The classroom infrastructure is not maintained. Only the H block classroom infrastructure has a smart board. In the main building for CSE, AIML, IT, ECE, and other branches, the infrastructure is not maintained. No Wi-Fi facility is provided by the college. It is only for hostellers in the hostel room. Wi-Fi is provided at a 50 Mbps speed in a laptop, but it is not provided for mobile devices.

reviews.review_heading: Full review of RKGIT Ghaziabad.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is quite good, like they have a sports complex indoor as well as outdoor, AC and fan in the classrooms, and hostel facility as well. The hostel food is too bad. You can prefer a flat or PG rather than their hostel. They have a canteen as well.

Sports facilities offered are football Ground, basketball court, volleyball court, and indoor stadium with chess, carrom, T. T, and kho-kho ground.

placements.overview: Govind Ballabh Pant Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research is a public institute, established in 1964 in Delhi. Govind Ballabh Pant Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research is approved by NMC and offers a total of 15 courses at PG, Advanced Masters and Post Doctorate levels in 10 specialisations such as Anaesthesia, Anesthesiology, Biochemistry, Cardiology and Gastroenterology. Furthermore, it offer courses such as MD, DM, M.Ch. and DNB in Full Time mode. Govind Ballabh Pant Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research fee structure includes a total tuition fee ranging from INR 39,000 to 2,25,000. Govind Ballabh Pant Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research has an annual seat intake of 58 for all the programmes. It offers courses, in stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. As per the recent Govind Ballabh Pant Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research placement records, the average median salary at the Institute is around INR 14,00,000. reviews_list.review_title: Good college for medical students

review_content.Placements: 80% of students are placed, Packege depends on their skills this college contains meny labs which contains well maintained apparatus Which make students to learn more and will enough to meet their accademic Standards , students here has a will infrastructured hostels for girl and boys
review_content.Infrastructure: Food on hostel is too homely Good hostel facility with all infra structure needed for students this college facilitate with all type of game ,sports. It has a large play ground for games like Soccer , cricket ets. It also has indore game facilitys even. To help poor people it conduct village cams

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is dynamic. Nearly everyone can get placements

review_content.Placements: In our course, many persons can get the opportunity to do internship, the starting package can be minimum of 6 to 8 lakhs per annum for a pg. It is 12 lakh per annum, who completed pg. Around 90% people got internship. The roles offered are medical assistants, and assistant professors. Majority got placed in top hospitals.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is okay.There is no official wifi connection, but we can talk to the service provider and can connect wifi personally. Every subject has it's own lab, and has sufficient lab equipment. Classes are conducted in skill center, it is a new academic block with a digital screen and projector. Perfect to listen classes. It can accommodate 250 persons. Mess food tastes good, no quality issues, hostel is okay. Medical facilities are available 24/7, our college encourages all types of sports.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Faculty is good and study going is well But infrastructure poorly mainly In hostle and lab

review_content.Placements: 65% about package. I have no proper ideas. No companies for placements in the government college. Average students got internship marks above 60%. KMC College prioritizes cardiologists. The top courses are cardiologist and surgeon. Average students in this course got 60%.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wifi is not available. Lab and classroom are not well developed and building infrastructure is not proper. Lab infrastructure is poorly developed and road are crushed and not good. Men's hostel facilities are poorly developed and mess not provide well food specially vegetarian.

review_summary.college_name: Kakatiya Medical College, Warangal Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the college, facilities, and the faculty.

content.Placements: All students who get seats in our college will be placed in our course. There will be no packages in our college because it is an MBBS college. We have to do internships after completing 4 years of study. The internship will be about 365 days. We will get a salary of Rs. 26,000 to 27,000 per month.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are very good. All 250 members were seated in one room which contained a projector and mike along with speakers. The ventilation and electricity will be super. Hostels are newly built with very good facilities. The food will be tasty. Our college has the biggest ground compared to all colleges present in Telangana.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: This college really teaches you what life is.

content.Placements: Almost 250 students are present in each batch, which started from the batch of 2019 (before that, 200 students were present in each batch). And 100% of the students get internships in the same hospital, which is associated with the same medical college. And there are a total of 19 subjects present from the 1st year to the final year.
content.Infrastructure: So we are having a newly constructed building which consists of 4 lecture halls, and an old building of approximately 70 years back which consists of all the laboratories of pre- and para-clinical subject departments. Apart from college buildings, we have a college library of 2 stars which is supported by Wi-Fi.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college, facilities, and the faculty.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are very good. All 250 members were seated in one room which contained a projector and mike along with speakers. The ventilation and electricity will be super. Hostels are newly built with very good facilities. The food will be tasty. Our college has the biggest ground compared to all colleges present in Telangana.

reviews.review_heading: This college really teaches you what life is.
reviews.review_text: So we are having a newly constructed building which consists of 4 lecture halls, and an old building of approximately 70 years back which consists of all the laboratories of pre- and para-clinical subject departments. Apart from college buildings, we have a college library of 2 stars which is supported by Wi-Fi.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for medical students
reviews.review_text:
Food on hostel is too homely  Good hostel facility with all infra structure needed for students   this college facilitate with all type of  game ,sports.
It has a large play  ground for games like Soccer , cricket ets.  It also has indore game facilitys even. To help poor people  it conduct village cams

reviews.review_heading: Our college is dynamic. Nearly everyone can get placements
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is okay.There is no official wifi connection, but we can talk to the service provider and can connect wifi personally. Every subject has it's own lab, and has sufficient lab equipment. Classes are conducted in skill center, it is a new academic block with a digital screen and projector. Perfect to listen classes. It can accommodate 250 persons. Mess food tastes good, no quality issues, hostel is okay. Medical facilities are available 24/7, our college encourages all types of sport...

reviews.review_heading:
Faculty is good and study going is well
But infrastructure poorly mainly In hostle and lab
reviews.review_text: Wifi is not available. Lab and classroom are not well developed  and building infrastructure is not proper. Lab infrastructure is poorly developed and road are crushed and not good. Men's hostel facilities are poorly developed and mess not provide well food specially vegetarian.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with faculty and studies. Campus could be better. Sports are good.
reviews.review_text: The college has two buildings. The old building has well-established labs, while the new building has very large lecture halls equipped with fans, lights, and sound systems. The mess food is good, with both vegetarian and non-vegetarian options available. Some hostels are new, while others are old. The best thing about the college is its grounds and sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty, good placements, facilities, infrastructure, etc.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are very good in the individual departments, and the labs and library are very useful for continuing all the books and lab instruments. In the hostel, the rooms are clean and well maintained, the food available in the mess is good, and also medical facilities are provided. Sports and games are firstly preferred.

reviews.review_heading: Experience of a lifetime in my college.
reviews.review_text: Last year, only the college got its own new building with a new canteen. The library is very nice and full of teaching stuff. However, mess food will not be suitable for North Indians, but if you are fond of varieties, then it will be best. Here, hostel life is going to be your life's moment.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities. Labs are good. The hostel is good. They provide games and sports facilities. The food served in the mess and canteen is good. Classrooms are spacious. The library is good. It has books related to courses.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities. Classrooms are good. There is an audio-visual classroom. We have an associated hospital. It gives practical knowledge about the subjects. The hostel is average. The food served in the mess and canteen is good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: The college building is brand new. So the infrastructure for college is well developed. There are labs for first- and second-year subjects, as the clinicals in third-year are done in hospitals. Wi-Fi is available on the college campus. There is a central library open to all. Apart from that, there are separate reading rooms in hostels. I can speak for the girls mess and hostel. The mess is good. As the college was built years ago, one hostel building is a little old. But the others are new and w...

reviews.review_heading: Our college has infrastructure, teachers, and pleasant environment.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides excellent infrastructure. Labs are well equipped. Classrooms that can accommodate up to 300 students. Projectors and audio-video visuals are available in classrooms. The examination hall is good.

reviews.review_heading: A good medical college with all the facilities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, mgm hospital, superspeciality hospital, and now multispeciality hospital are all being built, along with 6 other institutions. Two auditoriums, one basketball court, and new academic blocks with advanced facilities are there. Hostels are separate for both men and women.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the professors and their teaching skills.
reviews.review_text: There is a good hostel and a playground in the college. Seniors and juniors are also good. Hostel facilities are good including the food. Hostel rules are also good. Sports activities are also organized. Medical facilities are also present.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the faculty and lectures happening in my college.
reviews.review_text: We had an excellent faculty in our Kakatiya Medical College Warangal. We also had a perfect atmosphere which was more spacious. Good environment to read. Vast rooms. It allows our freedom. Hard work makes a man perfect. We were so working hard along with their guidelines our lot.

individual_reviews.title: I am dissatisfied with the ignorance of the management.

content.Placements: The highest package is 17 LPA, but lately, there have been almost 0 placements. Pharmacy students are promised yet this year our high package is 4 LPA, which is not what we signed for. It's truly a waste of money and all the time that we close with our family.
content.Infrastructure: Food is bad and almost every day students are suffering from food poisoning and water is contaminated. There are not enough healthcare facilities. The campus is good, but authorities are not. There is absolutely zero consideration for students due to their irrelevant backward thinking. Usually, girls are targeted.

individual_reviews.course: B.Pharm. + MBA in Pharmaceutical Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure, good teaching staff, and everyone is cooperative.

content.Placements: Low placement rates due to COVID-19 impact on education. However, the 2026 and 2027 batches are reaching great heights. The education is technical and practical in most aspects. However, timely seminars are conducted to stay in touch with market trends and fill the gaps. Timely assignments and cooperative teachers help to gain jobs.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is large, very clean, and hygienic. Food is veg only however eggs are available. The academic building is divided into four wings, one for pharmacy, two for both one for exam depth, audit, etc. The last one is for engineering labs, etc. Wi-Fi is available along with play areas for both boys and girls. There is a separate mess facility and a common canteen. On campus, a general store and xerox are available. There is a lush green campus and scenic views.

individual_reviews.title: An Insightful Review of NMIMS Shirpur: Academic Excellence and Campus Life" .

content.Placements: The university offers 100% placements for MBA Teach students, and almost all students are placed. The medium package for MBA students is around INR 5.50 LPA, and the highest salary package is around INR 22.40 LPA. NMIMS, Shirpur, has a good record of placements for its students.
content.Infrastructure: SVKM's NMIMS Deemed to be University ( as per UGC Norms) is expanding its wings beyond Mumbai and has set up its first Off-Campus center at Shirpur. The vision behind Shirpur Off-Campus Centre is to provide world class higher education by inculcating moral values and all-round development which enables students from various backgrounds to become true professionals in their respective fields. The off-campus center is in rural India and is shaping into an ideal center for academic excellence in the field of professional higher education. Next couple of years will SEE SVKM's NMIMS Shirpur Off-Campus Centre being counted among the elite few best Off-Campus centers in the world with research intensive facilities to promote higher education and an ideal center for academic excellence.

admission_overview.college_name: School of Pharmacy and Technology Management, Shirpur Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

admission_process.title: School of Pharmacy and Technology Management, NMIMS, Shirpur Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: School of Pharmacy and Technology Management, NMIMS, Shirpur admissionis through qualifying exam scores of the candidates. The institute offers courses at UG and PG levels in streams includingMedicine and Health Sciences.School of Pharmacy and Technology Management, NMIMS, Shirpuradmission is granted based on performance of the aspirants in exams, such asMHT CET, GPAT, and ISC. Candidates must register online on the institute’s website. For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department.
Candidates have to pay a total tuition fee ofINR 2,24,000 - 13,25,000for UG and PG level. Besides tuition fee, students also need to pay caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc.
Typically, the duration of the UG level courses ranges between 2 years - 4 years.

courses_data.name: School of Pharmacy and Technology Management, NMIMS, Shirpur B.Pharma Admission 2025
courses_data.description: School of Pharmacy and Technology Management, NMIMS, Shirpuroffers a 3 - 5 years B.Pharma course at the UG level. The institute offers B.Pharma in full time mode. Admission to B.Pharma course is based on scores of the aspirants in MHT CET, CBSE 12th, ISC, NMIMS CET, and Maharashtra State Board (MSBSHSE). There are a total of 170 seats in the B.Pharma programme. The total tuition fees for this course isINR 3,04,500 - 13,25,000. Check below the eligibility criteria for B.Pharma:

faqs.question: Does NMIMS School of Pharmacy Shirpur offer lateral entry to BPharm?
faqs.answer: Yes, NMIMS School of Pharmacy Shirpur offers lateral entry to BPharm programme. Candidates who have passed Diploma in Pharmacy with at least 60% aggregate from PCI approved institute. The school selects candidates for lateral entry based on the marks of the candidates in DPharm.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in BPharm at NMIMS School of Pharmacy Shirpur?
faqs.answer: NMIMS School of Pharmacy Shirpur admission to BPharm course is both merit and entrance-based. The school considers the CET score of the candidates for admission. Aspirants who have not appeared for CET may also apply subject to availability of seats.If seats remain vacant after admitting CET candidate then Non CET candidate will be admitted based on Class 12 or equivalent exam marks of PCM/ PCB and the preferences given by the candidate at the time of online registration.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for BPharm + MBA at NMIMS School of Pharmacy Shirpur?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to pass a minimum of Class 12 or equivalent with Science or Science vocational with Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics (PCM) or Physics, Chemistry and Biology (PCB) and English as compulsory subjects with at least 50% aggregate to apply for NMIMS School of Pharmacy Shirpur BPharm + MBA programme.

courses_data.name: School of Pharmacy and Technology Management, NMIMS, Shirpur M.Pharma Admission 2025
courses_data.description: School of Pharmacy and Technology Management, NMIMS, Shirpuroffers M.Pharma for 2 - 3 years at the PG level. This course is offered in full time mode. Candidates are offered admission in M.Pharma based on their qualifying exam scores. The university offers M.Pharma in specialisations such as Pharmaceutical and Pharmacognosy, etc. Selected candidates have to pay a total tuition fees ofINR 3,04,000 - 9,48,000. Check below the School of Pharmacy and Technology Management, NMIMS, Shirpur eligibility criteria for M.Pharma: Eligibility Criteria

faqs.question: How can I get seat in MPharm + MBA at NMIMS School of Pharmacy Shirpur?
faqs.answer: Candidates are offered seat in NMIMS School of Pharmacy Shirpur based on their performance in the personal interview round. The Personal Interview will be conducted only at Mumbai Campus and the venue will be communicated by call letter. Candidates who are registered successfully will be called for Personal Interview.

faqs.question: What is the fee for MPharm at NMIMS School of Pharmacy Shirpur?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for NMIMS School of Pharmacy Shirpur MPharm isINR 9.06 lakh. Candidates need to pay a course fee at the time of admission to confirm their seat in the school. Besides, aspirants also need to pay an application fee of INR 2,500 in the start to register for the course.

faqs.question: Which are the MPharm specialisations offered at NMIMS School of Pharmacy Shirpur?

faqs.question: Are admissions open at NMIMS School of Pharmacy Shirpur?
faqs.answer: NMIMS School of Pharmacy Shirpur admissions are currently open. Usually, the admission opens inDecemberwith online registration. The school closes the admission for most of the courses inAugust. Aspirants can apply for the preferred course on the official website of NMIMS.

faqs.question: How can I join NMIMS School of Pharmacy Shirpur?
faqs.answer: NMIMS School of Pharmacy &Technology Management admission 2024 is based on valid scores in course-specific or state-level entrance exam for most of the programmes. NMIMS University conducts NMIMS-CETwhich is considered for admission to MBA Pharma Tech programme at this institute. Admission to BPharm is based on marks scored in MHT-CET.In order to get into MPharm, candidates are required to appear for a Personal Interview. Additional weightage is assigned to candidates with a valid score in GPAT exam.

faqs.question: How many marks are required for admission at NMIMS School of Pharmacy, Shirpur?
faqs.answer: NMIMS School of Pharmacy Shirpur marks requirement varies course-wise. Candidates also need to fulfil the academic requirements to apply for a course. Below is course-wise eligibility criteria for NMIMS School of Pharmacy Shirpur:CourseCommon EligibilityBPharmClass 12 or equivalent with Science or Science vocational with Physics,  Chemistry, and Mathematics (PCM) or Physics, Chemistry and Biology  (PCB) and English as compulsory subjects with at least 45% aggregateBPharm + MBAClass 12 or equivalent with Science or Science vocational with Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics (PCM) or Physics, Chemistry and Biology (PCB) and English as compulsory subjects with at least 50% aggregateMPharmBPharm exam with at least 55% aggregateMPharm + MBABPharm exam with at least 55% aggregateDPharmClass 12 or equivalent with Science or Science vocational with Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics  (PCM) or Physics, Chemistry and Biology (PCB) and English as compulsory subjects

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at NMIMS School of Pharmacy, Shirpur?
faqs.answer: NMIMS School of Pharmacy Shirpur admissions are both merit and entrance-based. The school selects candidates for BPharm based on MHT CET score or merit in the last qualifying exam. NMIMS conducts NMIMS CET for shortlisting candidates for BPharm + MBA programme. Besides, admission to MPharm is based on the performance of the aspirants in the personal interview round.

reviews.review_text: The hostel is large, very clean, and hygienic. Food is veg only however eggs are available. The academic building is divided into four wings, one for pharmacy, two for both one for exam depth, audit, etc. The last one is for engineering labs, etc. Wi-Fi is available along with play areas for both boys and girls. There is a separate mess facility and a common canteen. On campus, a general store and xerox are available. There is a lush green campus and scenic views.

faqs.answer: School of Biotechnology and Bioinformatics, D Y Patil University BSc admission process includes multiple steps such as application process, selection process, counselling process, final admission. Candidates must begin the admission process with the online application process, which is conducted in complete online mode. Fill out the form with all the required informationa and make a payment of INR 2,000 as an application fee. Once the application form is submitted, DY Patil College of Engineering Navi Mumbai will send an acknowledgment email which will explain how to check the status of the application. Once the application has been received, it will be considered and the candidate might have to come for an interview/Group Discussion/Written Test or undertake the same online. It will further analyze the application to ensure the eligibility criteria for the programmes for the desired programme applying for.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Overall, a good college in terms of faculty, campus, career, and crowd.

content.Placements: Placement cell is useful, they offer 1:1 guidance to students, and they also have 1 student 1 placement rule, which is basically that if you choose for an in-house placement after your degree from all the positions you apply for, you at least get one.
content.Infrastructure: Excellent infrastructure, very good classroom, AC is everywhere, projectors are present in all the classrooms, campus is clean, labs are nice too, I personally don't like the chair in the Chemistry lab, but overall, the campus is good, and the library is also there. The canteen food isn't good, I don't like it at all, it feels expensive but is not good in taste, and the canteen also isn't clean. There aren't any sports and games in the Belapur campus, but you can access the Nerul campus if you give your ID card.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Sometimes maybe good, sometimes maybe bad.

content.Placements: The placements are yet to be conducted. The highest package was 2.2 LPA, and the lowest package was 1 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Dr Reddy's and Sun Pharma. 100 percent of students got internships at companies like Reliance, Biocon, and Cipla. The top role offered is quality assurance, Lab assistant, Research professor, and assistant professor.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure are as good as they get in a Tier 2 college. Every classroom has an AC. So it's beneficial in the summer. Class is also wide enough to accommodate 60+ students. The laboratories are probably the best part of my college as they include all the necessary equipment, which is often neglected in other labs. There's no hostel in my college.

admission_overview.title: School of Biotechnology and Bioinformatics DPU Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: DPU-School of Biotechnology and Bioinformatics admission 2026 is both entrance-based and merit-based. School of Biotechnology and Bioinformatics of D Y Patil (Deemed-to-be) University offers BTech and Integrated MSc (Biotechnology) at the UG level. At the PG level, the DPU-School of Biotechnology and Bioinformatics offers MSc in five specialisations. Additionally, SBB D Y Patil offers PhD in Biotechnology and Bioinformatics to research aspirants at the doctorate level. SBB DPU, Mumbai provides an environment of learning by facilitating practical experiences to prepare graduates for careers in Biotechnology, Biomedical and Bioinformatics. Also, it offers specialised professional programmes and research at graduate, post-graduate, and doctorate levels.

faqs.question: Can I join DY Patil School of Biotechnology and Bioinformatics directly?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can join DY Patil School of Biotechnology and Bioinformatics (DPBI) directly for certain B.Tech programs, but it depends on the specific programme and the availability of seats. For some programs, DPBI conducts its own entrance exam called AIBTCET (All India Biotechnology Entrance Test), while for others, direct admission is based on merit, considering factors such as your marks in class 12th and other relevant entrance exams.Programs with Direct Admission:•BTech Biotechnology•BTech Bioinformatics & Data SciencePrograms with AIBTCET:•BTech Food Science and Technology•BTech Biomedical Engineering

faqs.question: What entrance exam scores are accepted by DY Patil School of Biotechnology and Bioinformatics for admission?
faqs.answer: The DY Patil School of Biotechnology and Bioinformatics accepts entrance exam scores for admission to its B.Tech and M.Sc programs. The entrance exam for B.Tech consists of 100 objective type multiple choice questions in Physics, Chemistry, and Biology (Botany and Zoology) . The admission for B.Tech is based on the merit score obtained in the entrance exam conducted by the university. Similarly, admission to the M.Sc programme is based on the scores obtained in the last qualifying examination. The recognised national and state level entrance exam scores are accepted for admission to the institute. The specific entrance exams accepted by the university include JEE – Main, MHT – CET, NEET- UG, and DYPCET.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, a good college in terms of faculty, campus, career, and crowd.
reviews.review_text: Excellent infrastructure, very good classroom, AC is everywhere, projectors are present in all the classrooms, campus is clean, labs are nice too, I personally don't like the chair in the Chemistry lab, but overall, the campus is good, and the library is also there. The canteen food isn't good, I don't like it at all, it feels expensive but is not good in taste, and the canteen also isn't clean. There aren't any sports and games in the Belapur campus, but you can access the Nerul campus if you g...

reviews.review_heading: Sometimes maybe good, sometimes maybe bad.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are as good as they get in a Tier 2 college. Every classroom has an AC. So it's beneficial in the summer. Class is also wide enough to accommodate 60+ students. The laboratories are probably the best part of my college as they include all the necessary equipment, which is often neglected in other labs. There's no hostel in my college.

reviews.review_heading: DDynamic learning environment with strong faculty support and excellent industry connections.
reviews.review_text: Wi fi: Campus wide high speed internet connectivity. Labs: Well equipped laboratories for practical training and research. Classrooms: Modern, multimedia-enabled learning space. Library: Extensive collection of books journals and electronic resources.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is the best college in all the aspects.
reviews.review_text: The classes are good and air-conditioned. There are separate labs for the practicals. The campus is big. There is a separate ground for cricket and football. Indoor games are also available like TT, badminton, carrom, chess, etc. The library has various books to study, and it creates an environment to study, and the students love coming to this college.

reviews.review_heading: Fine but not the best. Needs improvement.
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure is not so good. It's just a building. There are only two lifts which are not enough. Very few things are available in the canteen, Hostel facilities are not available but there are a lot of PGs nearby. 
All the classrooms are spacious and have projectors, labs are good.

reviews.review_heading: Good student life, not so good academically.
reviews.review_text: The biotechnology labs are well-equipped, the engineering lab could be better but now they have new instruments so that's good. The main university has an amazing sports arena and the stadium. The school of biotech doesn't have much for infrastructure other than the labs.

There is one mid semester and one semester exam per semester. No handouts are given to students but most teachers share their presentations. overview_faqs.question: Is Computer Engineering a good choice for career?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, CSE (full form Computer Science and Engineering) is a good career choice if you are aspiring for a good salary package as a fresher. A Computer Engineering graduate's average salary in India is approx. INR 6 lakh and higher. Also, owing to the exponential rise in AI & ML concept), CSE course gradutes have got a competitive job market and abundant opportunities for career growth.

review_summary.college_name: Shri Neminath Jain Bhhramcharyashram Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: SNJB civil branch review.

content.Placements: I'm from the Department of Civil Engineering of SNJB College. In the year 2023, around 50 percent of the students were placed. The highest package was around 7 LPA, the lowest package was 1 LPA. The average package was around 2 LPA-3 LPA. Top recruiters are Rohan Builder, Anand Developer, Arihant Buildcon, etc.
content.Infrastructure: In our department, each classroom contains a smart board for visual learning of the graphic subject. Wi-Fi is also available. The central library is very useful for the students. Hostels are well-hygienic. Food quality is acceptable. An on-campus medical facility is also available.

individual_reviews.course: B.E in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied because the college infrastructure and teaching quality are good.

content.Placements: In the previous year, 75 percent of the students are placed. The average package offered is 4 to 5 LPA, the lowest package offered is 2 LPA and the highest package offered is 10 LPA. Top recruiters are Tata, Mahindra, etc. More than 75 percent of students got internship. This course offers an opportunity in various construction fields or working as labour under the contractor.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available throughout the college. Labs are well designed with all important equipment. Classrooms are well designed for a study environment. Library contains a variety of books. Hostel food is good. The canteen provides well hygienic snacks.

individual_reviews.course: B.E in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of teachers, facilities, and management team of the college.

content.Placements: In the previous years, more than 70 percent of the students were placed from our college. The highest package is around 10 LPA, the lowest package is around 2 LPA. The average package is around 5 LPA. More than 50 percent of students secure internships in top companies.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides various facilities. The infrastructure of our college is well-designed with new ideas. Department infrastructure is built as per the requirements of the course. Our college provides Wi-Fi in every corner of the college with good speed. Labs are well designed for specific subjects such as Physics and Chemistry, and others. Classroom consists of a smart board always connected with Wi-Fi to provide a quality digital learning experience to students every time. There is a huge library of our college called the central library, which contains numerous books for students related to academic and non-academic. Food is good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Good greenery environment for study.

content.Placements: Around 80 percent of the students got placed in the previous year. The highest package is around 10 LPA. The average package is 4 LPA to 5 LPA. The lowest package is 2 LPA. Around 70 percent of students got internships. Our top recruiters are TCS, Mahindra, Capgemini, Wipro, Infosys, Tata Motors, L&T Defence, and Bajaj Auto.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides the following facilities: Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, classrooms with a digital board, and a projector. We have a central library which consists of various kinds of books for students, non-academic and academic. The food quality provided by the hostel is too good. The canteen also provides various snacks. Our college encourages students to participate in sports, cultural activities, and various games.

individual_reviews.course: B.E in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The campus has a good study environment, which creates motivation to study.

content.Placements: As a first-year student, I will be passing out in 2029. According to the official SNJB website, in the academic year 2023-24, 23 students were placed out of 60 in the AI & IT course. The highest package was 9.5 LPA. The lowest package was 1.2 LPA. The average package was 4.5 LPA. Top recruiters are Jaro Education, Byju's, Infosys, and Mahindra. Jaro Education provided a package of more than 8 LPA to 5 students in the 2023-24 academic year.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure for our course is decent. There is a smart digital board in every classroom with Wi-Fi. The college has a huge central library containing a wide variety of books for specific courses. The mess provides tasty and good-quality food, including Jain food. Medical facilities are available for students 24/7 with a well-equipped dispensary on campus.

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

reviews.review_heading: SNJB civil branch review.
reviews.review_text: In our department, each classroom contains a smart board for visual learning of the graphic subject. Wi-Fi is also available. The central library is very useful for the students. Hostels are well-hygienic. Food quality is acceptable. An on-campus medical facility is also available.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because the college infrastructure and teaching quality are good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available throughout the college. Labs are well designed with all important equipment. Classrooms are well designed for a study environment. Library contains a variety of books. Hostel food is good. The canteen provides well hygienic snacks.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of teachers, facilities, and management team of the college.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides various facilities. The infrastructure of our college is well-designed with new ideas. Department infrastructure is built as per the requirements of the course. Our college provides Wi-Fi in every corner of the college with good speed. Labs are well designed for specific subjects such as Physics and Chemistry, and others. Classroom consists of a smart board always connected with Wi-Fi to provide a quality digital learning experience to students every time. There is a huge li...

reviews.review_heading: Good greenery environment for study.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides the following facilities: Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, classrooms with a digital board, and a projector. We have a central library which consists of various kinds of books for students, non-academic and academic. The food quality provided by the hostel is too good. The canteen also provides various snacks. Our college encourages students to participate in sports, cultural activities, and various games.

reviews.review_heading: The campus has a good study environment, which creates motivation to study.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for our course is decent. There is a smart digital board in every classroom with Wi-Fi. The college has a huge central library containing a wide variety of books for specific courses. The mess provides tasty and good-quality food, including Jain food. Medical facilities are available for students 24/7 with a well-equipped dispensary on campus.

reviews.review_heading: My review of this college.
reviews.review_text: It was a well-structured curriculum. It obviously helps if you know exactly what field you want your career in, but they also give us one year to figure out the subjects you want to do for your major. In the long term, it doesn't matter what subjects you studied. Hostel amenities are good. Hostel rooms are spacious, and we have single and shared basis hostels. Will be provided with wardrobes, individual beds, blankets, towels, pillows, tables and chairs. Also provides laundry facilities. Mess in...

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for engineering studies with average marks and income.
reviews.review_text: It is very good and very relevant in terms of the facilities and infrastructure at this college of engineering. The library, Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms are all top-class. The food available at the mess and canteen is so nice and tasty. For sports and games, we have a very big ground to play on.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides good facilities. The water and electricity facilities are good. The college is clean. The food served in the canteen is not good. Staff members are not good. They are not cooperative.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of the degree.
reviews.review_text:
Facilities in my college are average, as the other local colleges have. Department of artificial intelligence and data Science is at very low stage in this college of engineering. Hostel facilities is such that they provide only Jain food to the students, and the non-Jain students have to eat the jain food in this hostel 
.

reviews.review_heading: The college is too good by each parameter like placements, campus life, education, safety, etc.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is fabulous; there are many engineering marvels in the college. You have to look towards our central building; it is fabulous. The classrooms are also fully digital; in each classroom, there is one digital board and comfortable benches for sitting purposes. The labs are also too good to do our job and the whole campus is fully WI-FI connected. The hostel facility is also very good; there is also a WI-FI facility is available and many other things are good about the hostel, lik...

reviews.review_heading: An honest feedback of the college.
reviews.review_text: There are different classrooms for separate batches and years. There is a separate department for M.Pharma and B.Pharma. The college has labs for practicals. There is a Library with reading books and a digital library as well. The facilities in the hostel are good. The food is very good and medical facilities are also there. They have a Gymkhana and sports facilities available.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of college is good. Hostel for girls and boys are available. Which have great facilities. There is different hostel for boys and girls and long distance between both hostels. Food quality is also good of hostels both hostels. One day of week had special treat.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges.
reviews.review_text: Our college has the best campus. The infrastructure of our college is very good. All facilities are available in our college. All classrooms are very huge and clean. Labs, a library, and Wi-Fi are available in our college. Hostels are available in our college for both girls and boys.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: All the necessary infrastructure, equipment, and a library are provided in our college. Classrooms have projectors, blackboards, and whiteboards. Labs have good equipment. Library has many books. Wi-Fi facility and canteen are available. The infrastructure of our college is good.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements count, good infrastructure, good cleanliness.
reviews.review_text: In my college they provide very good facilities. Whole campus contains Internet connectivity, labs, classrooms, library is also very good. Cleanliness is commendable. All the necessary facilities are available in the canteen, they are very good. All the important sports competitions are also held.
